name: Christy Smith
subject: Uncertainty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hey Peter --

If I could pick one word to describe how I'm feeling in these final days, it's this: **Uncertainty.**

Uncertainty because no one can predict who will win this unprecedented Toss-Up race. Will our supporters make their voices heard at the polls? Will Donald Trump's last ditch efforts to save Mike Garcia and suppress voter turnout pay off? How will the pandemic affect voter turnout?

We don't know the answers.

But what has stayed constant, from day one of this race, is my determination to be the voice CA-25 needs in Congress. And what the last month has made clear is how truly important that is -- we cannot afford another rubber stamp for Trump's reckless agenda.

**We're down to the final two days of this special election. And really, every donation -- no matter how big or small -- could tip the scales.**

**[So I'm asking because it's never been more important, will you pitch in $5 or anything you can right now so we can win this Toss-Up seat?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7c/1018000514/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7d/1018000514/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7e/1018000514/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7f/1018000514/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e78/1018000514/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e79/1018000514/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7c/1018000514/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full")
Running for office is a truly humbling experience because you never know what can happen.

And boy... we really had no idea what we were getting into when we launched this campaign in October.

We had no idea our country would face an unprecedented pandemic that would completely change how we campaign and how voters would cast their ballots. We had no idea our opponents would sink to some truly horrific lows. We had no idea everyone from Pete Buttigieg to Kamala Harris to Hillary Clinton to Barack Obama would rally to support us.

We have hustled our hearts out every single step of the way.

And as we face the fast-approaching end of this special election, we can't afford to falter. We have to keep fighting our hearts out.

**[You've had my back every step of the way, Peter. I'm asking you to have it again today -- please chip in $5 or more right now. We only have two days left to finish this.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7c/1018000514/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full")**

Thank you,

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7c/1018000514/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTBfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200510_milliongoal16-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7a/1018000514/VEsHBQ/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e7b/1018000514/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd7/29776869/99d1903/569f1e74/1018000514/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4866/4bd7760e/5b9c9678/77af29bf/3881715000/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200510_1MO_1MC_STD_1_Senatebattleground&source=314_EM_FR_200510_1MO_1MC_STD_1_Senatebattleground")** to make a donation.

body:
How will you help lead our grassroots campaign to victory?

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
https://youtu.be/MNpJvJPBuhs?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
Don't take it from me, listen to the other candidates in this race tell you why I'm the Iowa neighbor Congress needs right now.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
Hello

I hope your family had a wonderful Mother's Day today. I so appreciate the support my mom has given me throughout my life, and especially during this campaign for Congress.

In the last few months, I've done more meetings online than I've ever thought I'd do in a lifetime. Just recently, we had a candidate forum hosted by the
Iowa Young Republicans (https://www.facebook.com/IowaYoungRepublicans?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) (watch here (https://www.facebook.com/IowaYoungRepublicans/videos/276705220158901?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) ).

But honestly, there's nothing quite like standing in an Iowan's front yard or in their place of business and talking with them face-to-face.

That's why I was very excited this week to put together a mini parade through Marathon and Sioux Rapids as well as
learn a few things about permitting from a local gun store owner (https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress/videos/2686822898112263/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) . It was great to meet and see other Iowans in person this week and I'm sure you've had similar experiences.

With just 22 days to go, Iowans are casting absentee votes in record numbers. Make sure your voice is heard and don't forget to remind those around you to vote as well. If you'll be voting on June 2, be sure to check how many polling places will be open in your county. In many counties across the district, only one polling place will be open.
ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
CHIP IN $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
CALL YOUR NEIGHBORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
Did you see last week's debate? If not, click here (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t=3820s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) to watch. Please share the link far and wide; it's critical voters know who is looking to represent them. Coming off of a strong showing, I'm confident Iowans will make the right choice in this election.
WATCH THE DEBATE (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
While Iowa PBS intended to host a debate this week on television, it has been canceled. Congressman King and state Senator Feenstra did not want to face tough questions about their records on live TV. Sadly, they're doing a disservice to Iowa voters who are being denied the chance to hear how they'd serve them in Congress. Read my full remarks here (https://caffeinatedthoughts.com/2020/05/richards-calls-on-feenstra-king-to-agree-to-televised-debate/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) on King and Feenstra going back on their promises to participate in a series of debates.
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these uncertain times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. With just 22(!) days to go, can you help us share our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home?
LETTER OF SUPPORT

Sean Sebourn, Jefferson: "I wish everyone in the Fourth District could meet Bret Richards personally. If they did, he would win by a landslide. Bret Richards is a man of his word, a deep down good person whose handshake means everything. I want to be represented by just such a person. I expect you do, too." READ MORE (https://richardsforcongress.com/letter-to-the-editor-in-support-of-bret-richards/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)

WRITE YOUR OWN LETTER OF SUPPORT (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-running-as-blue-jeans-candidate-for-term-limits-speaks-with-kiwa/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489

"Growing up in Iowa, my experience in the Army as a combat engineer officer, my business background, I think those skills are exactly what our country needs. We need people who can solve problems, people who listen to the public because that’s where the answers are, and people who will actually live their conservative principles and get things done.”
https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-talks-getting-tough-on-china-restoring-the-founders-vision-and-executive-overreach-on-open-line-with-charlie-stone/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489

“One of the first things I'll do is go find anybody that served in the military. I can go find business people. I can go find engineers. And say, ‘Look, we've got a real problem with our debt and we've got to get things done because the security of our nation is at stake.’”

MISS LAST WEEK'S DEBATE?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIFerpkp4-0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489

Highlights:
* Defending Gun Rights (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YlvTSvDu8UY&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* Draining the Swamp (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CajSnx-JPaQ&t&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* Sticking up for Ethanol (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIFerpkp4-0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* Balancing the Budget (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kz489BQi6jE&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* or watch the full debate (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)

STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)
* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489)

GET INVOLVED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RU58q_EtpqU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489
YARD AND BARN SIGNS NOW AVAILABLE! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY!
We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) we still need your help!

Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) to lend a hand!

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=4379cb90fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-4379cb90fd-25822489) to stay up to date!

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: Did You Hear Rush Talk About This?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140526:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "Rep Vernon Jones") Peter: Rush has been talking about this story a lot, but if you have not heard what happened to Georgia State Rep Vernon Jones yet, I will break it down for you. Vernon is a Democrat in the Georgia Statehouse. Recently, he said what I have known for years: **President Trump has done more for the Black Community in America than any other President.** What happened next is something I have experienced firsthand many times: liberals exploded in rage when a black man does not toe the line for the Democrat Party. Jones was called everything under the sun by the so-called enlightened left. Vernon is human, and soon announced that he was going to resign - until he stopped listening to the liberal media and started listening to the people he represents. They wanted him to stay, _and he quickly withdrew his resignation._ | | [MAKE BLACK AMERICA CONSERVATIVE AGAIN](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140526:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "MAKE BLACK AMERICA
CONSERVATIVE AGAIN")
---
Courage is doing what you know is right, even when it will be unpopular.
My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for the one and only Rush Limbaugh.
After sitting beside Rush for all these years and refusing to think the way the radical left thinks I should, I have been called every derogatory name you can think of. I knew that more and more people in the Black community were starting to see the truth about Democrats, and I knew I had to do something to help - so I started the New Journey PAC.
We are supporting Black conservative candidates throughout the country - _and we need your help. We cannot allow the radical leftists to intimidate Black conservatives any longer and therefore it is essential that we provide them resources from money to grassroots support to ensure they will not be chased away._
| [MAKE BLACK AMERICA CONSERVATIVE AGAIN](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140526:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "MAKE BLACK AMERICA
CONSERVATIVE AGAIN")
---
**Vernon knew his decision would be unpopular with the liberal cocktail set, but he did it anyways because he knew that Donald Trump is working for all Americans - black and white.**
This is the truth that the liberal media is working overtime to suppress. Once people know the truth about President Trump, he will be re-elected by a historic margin.
**You and I both know this is true, but if we are going to convince the rest of the nation, we need your immediate financial assistance.**
We are planning to make an impact in several races nationwide for Black conservatives who share President Trump's vision for America. **[Your donation of just $35 could be the deciding factor for a Black Republican candidate. Please donate today.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140527:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "Your donation of just $35 could be the deciding factor for a
Black Republican candidate. Please donate today.")**
For a New Journey,
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140526:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
**P.S.** Vernon bravely broke ranks from his party and endorsed Donald Trump's re-election and they tried to hang him for it. Those liberals claim to fight for the Black Community, but in reality, it is only when you think their way. We cannot allow other candidates like Vernon to suffer. **[Please Donate as much as you can RIGHT NOW.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140526:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "Please Donate as much as you can RIGHT NOW.")**
| [MAKE BLACK AMERICA CONSERVATIVE AGAIN](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55140526:WKwy_L-mN:m:1:1155937413:188A29ECB9A21E0532089466D6F2FE5A:r "MAKE BLACK AMERICA
CONSERVATIVE AGAIN")
---
| **PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE**
---
This email was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

This email was sent by: Scott Walker Inc., Post Office Box 620437, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: "Rep Vernon Jones" Peter: Rush has been talking about this story a lot, but if you have not heard what happened to Georgia State Rep Vernon Jones yet, I will break it down for you. Vernon is a Democrat in the Georgia Statehouse. Recently, he said what I have known for years: President Trump has done more for the Black Community in America than any other President. What happened next is something I have experienced firsthand many times: liberals exploded in rage when a black man does not toe the line for the Democrat Party. Jones was called everything under the sun by the so-called enlightened left. Vernon is human, and soon announced that he was going to resign - until he stopped listening to the liberal media and started listening to the people he represents. They wanted him to stay, and he quickly withdrew his resignation. | | "MAKE BLACK AMERICA CONSERVATIVE AGAIN" Courage is doing what you know is right, even when it will be unpopular. My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for the one and only Rush Limbaugh. After sitting beside Rush for all these years and refusing to think the way the radical left thinks I should, I have been called every derogatory name you can think of. I knew that more and more people in the Black community were starting to see the truth about Democrats, and I knew I had to do something to help - so I started the New Journey PAC. We are supporting Black conservative candidates throughout the country - and we need your help. We cannot allow the radical leftists to intimidate Black conservatives any longer and therefore it is essential that we provide them resources from money to grassroots support to ensure they will not be chased away. | "MAKE BLACK AMERICA CONSERVATIVE AGAIN" Vernon knew his decision would be unpopular with the liberal cocktail set, but he did it anyways because he knew that Donald Trump is working for all Americans - black and white. This is the truth that the liberal media is working overtime to suppress. Once people know the truth about President Trump, he will be re-elected by a historic margin. You and I both know this is true, but if we are going to convince the rest of the nation, we need your immediate financial assistance. We are planning to make an impact in several races nationwide for Black conservatives who share President Trump's vision for America. "Your donation of just $35 could be the deciding factor for a Black Republican candidate. Please donate today." For a New Journey, "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley" James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley Founder, New Journey PAC P.S. Vernon bravely broke ranks from his party and endorsed Donald Trump's re-election and they tried to hang him for it. Those liberals claim to fight for the Black Community, but in reality, it is only when you think their way. We cannot allow other candidates like Vernon to suffer. "Please Donate as much as you can RIGHT NOW." | "MAKE BLACK AMERICA CONSERVATIVE AGAIN" | PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE This email was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Chase For Congress
subject: BREAKING: Albuquerque Journal Endorses Claire Chase
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | Editorial: Journal's primary pick for Congress District 2 Albuquerque Journal Editorial Board May 11, 2020 [https://www.abqjournal.com/1454054/journals-primary-picks-for-congress-districts-1-and-2.html](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kqga4BhNxYvnYEh_ZVzcOad99Rlnntnk1tXf5RY8oSg35oVyik8zFJnEaalixofbnPlz-6RY98SRo1ye6eeh2lAWJILvMhb19x8O6MiSljXqTf2jYxTI5LGFDOfEPaDUFMIjERZhwxzqOukJeUp70QVV7MkheqNQMcO-SpGUe5xpcORA5wI4x4LSjgPq5Wd6g-2lsYou_A6sX5RLfBd9m9r1TBxIEmezvTXVLFmUX091b7jJblr7IQ==&c=gqHGTF9nWtuANWN4MXkdRI24Ig6UJuQEJZ4phnZeAu9yOFCxaj8YUQ==&ch=XYXF1HC2APxc2J-HNp99AqR6VSufRGcA2wc-_xBHAj1i5xw5pMkbKw==)
District 2 GOP primary - Claire Chase
Chase is a first-time candidate, but she's not new to the political scene, having been an advocate for the oil and gas industry for seven years. Chase was the first woman and youngest chairman of the New Mexico Oil & Gas Association and was also president of the Independent Petroleum Association of New Mexico. She and her husband own Mack Energy of Artesia and a pecan farm in Eddy County, another important industry in the 2nd District, which spans the southern half of New Mexico. Her extensive background in the O&G industry enables her to be a strong advocate for thousands of oilfield workers in a time of tremendous strife.
Chase also has experience on Capitol Hill, having worked for former U.S. Rep. Steve Pearce and former Sen. Pete Domenici. She says she learned how to fight from Pearce and how to be a statesman from Domenici. The New Mexico Military Institute high school graduate and mother of 3-year-old twins says she got into the race because younger, conservative leaders need to step up.
She says her priorities include securing our border, which will help improve the economy and decrease the crime rate, and she believes Congress needs to increase checkpoint funding and the worker visa program, especially for those in the oil and gas and agricultural industries. She says 2nd Amendment rights are important to her district and dedicated mental health funding is the way to address the "broken people" caught up in drugs and crime. And as the granddaughter of a base commander, she wants to ensure those in New Mexico stay strong.
The winner in the GOP primary will face incumbent U.S. Rep. Xochitl Torres Small, who is unopposed in the Democratic primary.
---
| ###
---
| [ClaireChase.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kqga4BhNxYvnYEh_ZVzcOad99Rlnntnk1tXf5RY8oSg35oVyik8zFFZTRl4dijvtvP5Ladkqkqezzx2vDRyF3QazHQ9BKyVAlZmr55bNqZk_-3waKDMu6ZvAU33ZngoB5CGlBeqAxvrr8Ul35IXgBQ==&c=gqHGTF9nWtuANWN4MXkdRI24Ig6UJuQEJZ4phnZeAu9yOFCxaj8YUQ==&ch=XYXF1HC2APxc2J-HNp99AqR6VSufRGcA2wc-_xBHAj1i5xw5pMkbKw==)

body:
But it Does Heighten a Political Imperative

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17449160/194879705/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTZhNjY4ZC05YzkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P31YjPeRlClOo_Ubeq_hVONHcRXJPnJzQBg9BSLN2t0=&emci=1c322930-8393-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=456a668d-9c93-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10438639)
---
Dear Friend, Our failure to competently handle the COVID-19 pandemic isn't a political opportunity, it is a clarion call to _all of us_ to repair the foundations of our democracy. I saw an (un-cited) post on social media that resonates: "_But most of all, this crisis is a direct result of the politicization of every aspect of our society for the benefit of a privileged few. The vilification of education, science, media, natural rights, rural lifestyles, urban lifestyles, charity, compassion, and virtually everything else for brief political gain, has gutted our society_." This is not a normal election cycle, where the kitchen table issues of health care, the economy, equality, education and infrastructure that we hold dear are front and center. We cannot hope to even begin to address those in the current political and social environment. **[The need to address our fundamental divides](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17449161/194879706/1916827524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTZhNjY4ZC05YzkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P31YjPeRlClOo_Ubeq_hVONHcRXJPnJzQBg9BSLN2t0=&emci=1c322930-8393-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=456a668d-9c93-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10438639) has been a day one issue for me. name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Three – President Trump
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Welcome back for another chapter of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
Today we will dive into Lisa Scheller's support of illegal immigration and sanctuary cities focusing on her vote to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county that would harbor dangerous illegal immigrants! Before we begin, I would like to make one thing clear: This Series is a direct response to Lisa Scheller's phony, slanderous website, where she paid Washington Establishment consultants thousands of dollars to smear my name.
I am doing this to DEFEND myself against Lisa Scheller's attacks. Bottom line: There is only ONE true, Trump conservative in this race - me!
I am passionate and fiercely devoted to the people of Lehigh Valley. I am fearful of what will happen to our district if Lisa Scheller is allowed to quietly push her Liberal Agenda on the national stage, like she has done here in the Lehigh Valley. This is why I need your help TODAY.
A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help me to expose Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller for who she really is!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWOO2lij4oV825TFCR_DnygsVE8wcAExQdXK9tEmZW_sBWQbXTxcyWO8G9Qi4XJbdaGAFtehkSXbHsY4-yVC7ZPfoPClHqr_mnql9_wXtVEQA67mSA9Ku9X78LMM1P2StMc25pEVQv8rE7Uxr5MVMAdS94p4dY83t8owvixKHh1Nl1IFQb1i1A==&c=DEGPDXNdzr43A4r-AftflfohxR3COy0tnjFpTH5F4xrgZEOwIJ2H2w==&ch=4fIlQyaEFqCWKvflJmDNq0ntNN0Ez2Kv6bu7SuGSOnhzUmCXLKLqFQ==)
---
| Lisa Scheller tries to make herself appear as though she is against illegal immigration and sanctuary cities, but the facts - and her OWN VOTE - say differently.
Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller as County Commissioner VOTED TO MAKE LEHIGH COUNTY A SANCTUARY COUNTY.
Resolution No. 2014-36 made Lehigh County non-compliant and a sanctuary county.
This is confirmed by the fact that Lehigh County is on a list of sanctuary jurisdictions complied by Homeland Security in response to President Trump's Executive Order 13768.
Under this Resolution, local law enforcement is prevented from complying with any warrant issued by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) asking that dangerous criminals, such as MS-13 gang members, be held for an additional 48 hours until ICE can take custody!
So how could Lisa Scheller be against sanctuary cities when she voted to ensure dangerous GANG MEMBER'S would be released back into OUR OWN community?
Do you believe she just magically changed her mind now that she is running for Congress? I don't buy it, as Lisa hasn't said anything about sanctuary cities during the previous five years since she voted to make Lehigh a Sanctuary County. Not - One - Word!
The Lehigh Valley needs a real, staunch conservative, not a Liberal, Lying, so-called "Republican" who votes more like The Squad (Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York, Ilhan Omar of Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan), than any conservative I know.
Here is my policy: I am AGAINST illegal immigration. I am AGAINST sanctuary cities. I SUPPORT legal immigration from all countries for families and individuals who go through the process and want to be in America to contribute to our society and pursue the American Dream. Lisa Scheller, similar to Rep. Susan Wild, is in full support of releasing dangerous illegal aliens and GANG MEMBERS back into the community with absolutely zero consequences.
This is factual evidence of Lying Lisa Scheller saying one thing and then doing the complete opposite!!! If you're like me and support our President, Donald J. Trump, in ending sanctuary cities and cracking down on dangerous illegal aliens and GANG MEMBERS, then I encourage you to contribute to my campaign today!

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Welcome back for another chapter of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller. Today we will dive into Lisa Scheller's support of illegal immigration and sanctuary cities focusing on her vote to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county that would harbor dangerous illegal immigrants! Before we begin, I would like to make one thing clear: This Series is a direct response to Lisa Scheller's phony, slanderous website, where she paid Washington Establishment consultants thousands of dollars to smear my name. I am doing this to DEFEND myself against Lisa Scheller's attacks. Bottom line: There is only ONE true, Trump conservative in this race - me! I am passionate and fiercely devoted to the people of Lehigh Valley. I am fearful of what will happen to our district if Lisa Scheller is allowed to quietly push her Liberal Agenda on the national stage, like she has done here in the Lehigh Valley. This is why I need your help TODAY. A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help me to expose Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller for who she really is! | | | == | Lisa Scheller tries to make herself appear as though she is against illegal immigration and sanctuary cities, but the facts - and her OWN VOTE - say differently. Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller as County Commissioner VOTED TO MAKE LEHIGH COUNTY A SANCTUARY COUNTY. Resolution No. 2014-36 made Lehigh County non-compliant and a sanctuary county. This is confirmed by the fact that Lehigh County is on a list of sanctuary jurisdictions complied by Homeland Security in response to President Trump's Executive Order 13768. Under this Resolution, local law enforcement is prevented from complying with any warrant issued by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) asking that dangerous criminals, such as MS-13 gang members, be held for an additional 48 hours until ICE can take custody! So how could Lisa Scheller be against sanctuary cities when she voted to ensure dangerous GANG MEMBER'S would be released back into OUR OWN community? Do you believe she just magically changed her mind now that she is running for Congress? I don't buy it, as Lisa hasn't said anything about sanctuary cities during the previous five years since she voted to make Lehigh a Sanctuary County. Not - One - Word! The Lehigh Valley needs a real, staunch conservative, not a Liberal, Lying, so-called "Republican" who votes more like The Squad (Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York, Ilhan Omar of Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan), than any conservative I know. Here is my policy: I am AGAINST illegal immigration. I am AGAINST sanctuary cities. I SUPPORT legal immigration from all countries for families and individuals who go through the process and want to be in America to contribute to our society and pursue the American Dream. Lisa Scheller, similar to Rep. Susan Wild, is in full support of releasing dangerous illegal aliens and GANG MEMBERS back into the community with absolutely zero consequences. This is factual evidence of Lying Lisa Scheller saying one thing and then doing the complete opposite!!! If you're like me and support our President, Donald J. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Making a mom proud!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Your Mother's Day card was amazing!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008e/7f51f7bc/4fac8e7c/4ef15c98/2746967748/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I got your amazing card yesterday, and I just wanted to say thank you so much for wishing me a happy Mother's Day! The card was a bright spot during what's been a tough time for many people, and I truly appreciate it.

I got into this race to fight for a better future for my children and yours -- and you can always count on me to stand up for them. **[We've still got a lot of work to do to flip the Senate, so let's keep up the progress over the coming months.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008e/7f51f7bc/4fac8e7c/4ef15c9f/2746967748/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200511.1nd__1382__&amount=10")**

This campaign has always been a grassroots effort, and knowing that y'all have my back means so much to me. Together we can defeat Sen. Cornyn and bring real Texas values to the Senate -- thank you for being part of this team!

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008e/7f51f7bc/4fac8e7c/4ef15c9f/2746967748/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200511.1nd__1382__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008e/7f51f7bc/4fac8e7c/4ef15c9e/2746967748/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1382&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489008e/7f51f7bc/4fac8e7c/4ef15c9d/2746967748/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Joni Ernst
subject: Could you answer one quick question?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
As a US Senator, and as a mother myself, I know just how important it is to stand up for those who can't stand up for themselves, no matter the cost. That's why during my time in the Senate I've continued to fight for pro-life policies, and strengthen the pro-life movement across our country.
As a US Senator, and as a mother myself, I know just how important it is to stand up for those who can't stand up for themselves, no matter the cost. That's why during my time in the Senate I've continued to fight for pro-life policies, and strengthen the pro-life movement across our country.

body:

Between raising record amounts of money and leading in several polls in multiple states across the country--there is a serious risk that the Democrats could flip the Senate blue this November. In order to stop that from happening, we're reaching out to Mitch McConnell's top supporters to see if they'll take action today.

| Friends, It's national Nurses Week this week. We at the NH Senate Republicans think that now more than ever it is important that we thank our Nurses and other medical professionals for the important work that they do for our state! **With that in mind, I want to give a special thanks to one of our colleagues, the New Hampshire Senate's only Nurse, [Sen. Ruth Ward](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE4ODQ5OTYzMDEzNTc2MTk3JmM9ZzF0NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDY3NzU1NTQmZD1lMXQwYTBq.xMEhzHkxDHFSk8f7WFko7O68SDIEGTw2ejFrXFTnorc). ** Ruth worked as a Nurse Practitioner for over 20 years, dedicating her life to the health and well-being of her patients. We are lucky to have her now working to ensure the health and well-being of our entire New Hampshire community! I ask that you all join me in wishing Ruth a very happy national Nurse's week by making a [small donation of $15, $25 or $100 to her campaign](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE4ODQ5OTYzMDEzNTc2MTk3JmM9ZzF0NyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDY3NzU1NTgmZD1wNG44YTZy.PZUJWOUVzqMfhA7dWO5QHOMSx9hkJJZhmOKDxgLVimo) so she can continue working for our great state. Thank you, Sen. Jeb Bradley

name: Jeff Van Drew
subject: A Strong America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Drew for Congress
body:
I want to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for future generations, but Nancy Pelosi has put a target on my back and is determined to take back my seat for the Democrats
Friend,
Like I told President Trump in the Oval Office, I became a Republican because the Democratic Party has become a party led by extreme socialists who are fixated on trying to remove the President from office. Unfortunately, things didn't change once the coronavirus pandemic hit and we saw yet again just how partisan and petty my former party could be -- even in the face of one of the greatest challenges our nation has ever faced.
That's why I'm running for re-election as a Republican. I want to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for future generations, but Nancy Pelosi has put a target on my back and is determined to take back my seat for the Democrats. [_**Will you chip in $10, $25 or even $50 to help me fight back and keep this seat for the NJGOP?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a6vfGCiBh87L63RNFe2QtmBlIsb2XFoPsCSvcSNAAvhzCuWMhW2qZSLmwOExcLxkMOm8c0GkCMDprRGok004sxb0jwzFMR9zowGpdY0HvpZlpmaN-bDiPlqR-piNSSmuHzPv4-BkGmGvs_rbYSghXXYeGitNKFeOF53arW1raY3IpJfvt5SOTvhn99hWE84If6JACacJcDW0CquuNaZI2nAB22eRTet1aEzPcovP6LIVhvbzw334TfAhoTcEyi00mNV1Px09d9NRVC_sKzomTx4L06SYavbXbLUvEdFyrRXlZAti1K9JeWY30phWbIVIZjNNH0dpVeuE2pRgBxiM3HCxFEs1H9Ozs6-nCwZPJEDLCuXDJWXk2jQUuTAl2EEdm6_AWkIZiSE=&c=BhJ7UWkFTfURpZEiW-n6YoTNuB7lktWxIFflbW00ZA8q_vokp9wvCw==&ch=5U_KVRu_v5WgwBDwcS4VT6QAWwOOS6SzhED1kUpow3T7FAWAC9kALg==)

clean_body: I want to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for future generations, but Nancy Pelosi has put a target on my back and is determined to take back my seat for the Democrats Friend, Like I told President Trump in the Oval Office, I became a Republican because the Democratic Party has become a party led by extreme socialists who are fixated on trying to remove the President from office. Unfortunately, things didn't change once the coronavirus pandemic hit and we saw yet again just how partisan and petty my former party could be -- even in the face of one of the greatest challenges our nation has ever faced. That's why I'm running for re-election as a Republican. I want to keep America great and guarantee A Strong America for future generations, but Nancy Pelosi has put a target on my back and is determined to take back my seat for the Democrats. == == A Strong America means strong borders to make sure that our country is safe. It means a strong military so we always have the protection and strength we need. A Strong America means having a strong supply chain so that we produce and manufacture our own goods - so that we produce and manufacture drugs and prescriptions right here in the United States of America. Independence is what keeps us strong. Self-reliance is what keeps us going. We cannot rely on other countries, like Communist China, to help us - we must always put America first! I need your help to get that message of A STRONG AMERICA out - chip in today so we can get our message far and wide: == == == == There are those that would try to silence us - those who think America is not the greatest country on earth. Thank you, Jeff Van Drew United States Congressman == Paid for by Van Drew for Congress. name: John Cornyn
subject: OUTRAISED.
body:
Friend, As you know, Democrats are just FOUR seats away from flipping the Senate. They're fighting tooth and nail to take the majority for themselves, and they're fighting harder than ever.
Now, as my team and I dive into the numbers, we're concerned that they have a real chance.
This year, Cook Political Report is calling FOUR states toss-ups: Maine, Colorado, Arizona, and North Carolina.
The troubling news? Democrats only need to pick up FOUR seats to retake the majority and they recently OUTRAISED incumbents in THESE SAME FOUR TOSS-UP races: **#MajorityWatch**
**Maine: OUTRAISED by Dems** **Colorado: OUTRAISED by Dems** **Arizona: OUTRAISED by Dems** **North Carolina: OUTRAISED by Dems** [ **DEFEND THE MAJORITY** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3WR3zjylMQrji3XPvQUH4-VHb_Hfu2I5MTpmdmHLUcfozWonhTS6HtB10A9rUbjfDLDCF5O3TUZ1uZnaYm5b79p126uQcPXJmfwYhyEQzxc9YhJSBbVZpAGfLFcdPYnt_ZAMplx63CaPX3T-edLJ7MPnvQ-6eRmCp1bEJWJXjievgWVEA_VrHqSyDIt2W23YcRoAKSMEtpzEDSuVS0QmDXG7hug_4iVbMfH7wFUHEJ7Q1VZXmBpbjiJLxwC619VmyOTEEMZBqLlH8Yn1lgvCxYM9qyNz5B8FlIn5L_6IO6povRvVFIvhrDs=&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==) **Friend, the Senate majority is truly at risk, and we simply CAN'T afford to lose it.**
We can't afford to lose our ability to confirm conservative judges.
We can't afford to lose our ability to place a check on Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and the liberal House.
I'm asking for your help today to stand up for our conservative values and make sure that TEXAS isn't added to the OUTRAISED list above.
**[By chipping in just $25 right now, your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED, and help ensure that President Trump has the conservative allies he needs in a RED Senate.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3WR3zjylMQrji3XPvQUH4-VHb_Hfu2I5MTpmdmHLUcfozWonhTS6HtB10A9rUbjfDLDCF5O3TUZ1uZnaYm5b79p126uQcPXJmfwYhyEQzxc9YhJSBbVZpAGfLFcdPYnt_ZAMplx63CaPX3T-edLJ7MPnvQ-6eRmCp1bEJWJXjievgWVEA_VrHqSyDIt2W23YcRoAKSMEtpzEDSuVS0QmDXG7hug_4iVbMfH7wFUHEJ7Q1VZXmBpbjiJLxwC619VmyOTEEMZBqLlH8Yn1lgvCxYM9qyNz5B8FlIn5L_6IO6poG_N1LHRYcpo=&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==) **
**[Will you make a TRIPLE MATCHED contribution to SAVE THE SENATE right now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3WR3zjylMQrji3XPvQUH4-VHb_Hfu2I5MTpmdmHLUcfozWonhTS6HtB10A9rUbjfDLDCF5O3TUZ1uZnaYm5b79p126uQcPXJmfwYhyEQzxc9YhJSBbVZpAGfLFcdPYnt_ZAMplx63CaPX3T-edLJ7MPnvQ-6eRmCp1bEJWJXjievgWVEA_VrHqSyDIt2W23YcRoAKSMEtpzEDSuVS0QmDXG7hug_4iVbMfH7wFUHEJ7Q1VZXmBpbjiJLxwC619VmyOTEEMZBqLlH8Yn1lgvCxYM9qyNz5B8FlIn5L_6IO6poZlu0KXuwIBU=&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==)**
John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3R_eYtpR0CnREDYzHh2Lp70wb4FitZTonq3WokxzmRaaMJWv9rQ2Oe8DS5FNwrrpWXh8rkpJs-1bUPg7z9FT_y3KAp1J6ExhOodWhRASyAce6eS8eOeCIYU=&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3auMXsTWHVB-H4dvP2v2ou8GUdU-I9rT2f4NPzFvx3XeR23rX3PliE0cjeKE3cMxbOq1aLhoAoJ-yHjRHuZoMWK9qrBK1bWyqJ2KuxPM8eGz&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3R_eYtpR0CnRssk6_74iwPVQ9DInIryNqJWCvBdK2FcU-OYX6yXVKZlEOyXbrYcTZEvVk3d2qiWeXzTyNPcgmxrtNZSRJU_h06OKC9imb2wM3B_kCAvQ_QXhR716u28fqA==&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qHgYq9LsqZt8cbdyc_6vhaQw-eH7eNkBKCcKLTl3hB9gGuK83F7i3QzQT2eQ5ePNrs25A8X3tUO4vsQwmPk21thbCY90pgQ79D40RwuG4V6rQcUUtv8bGv3caNBxi4Ks_oo3DB3Y4pQb0MKOURrHbMkXcNcNGNfw7m5IL3OoQ_ftPUfvyK0D5HUTiuxd6doW2eEoD5HdoDJAI8Kik93p-mmu5yAiug4P85wJAH0awNDqUjl6DMycvggzoW0uomg_9TE3cLDTOSrX1Y0FWH7JmJiNR3iZsHKm-Y4Kw1Cl3QQLJPv46jl1Vw==&c=A1P2j32wWu6GswHjER9-1FFvfJyVcpTTMEeTKrBv1Kk1K0hdj4SWvA==&ch=MO-Bbr1b_t7b8ncuDDQRO2B7NTtjaYyNT7EzC2B7C8BIgrdrumeuDw==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Flynn and the Anatomy of a Political Narrative
body:
"The FBI coordinated very closely with the Obama White House on the investigation of Michael Flynn, while the Obama Justice Department was asleep..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06b632993e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Flynn and the Anatomy of a Political Narrative**

“The FBI coordinated very closely with the Obama White House on the investigation of Michael Flynn, while the Obama Justice Department was asleep at the switch. That is among the most revealing takeaways from Thursday’s decision by Attorney General Bill Barr to pull the plug on the prosecution of Flynn,” Andrew McCarthy writes in _National Review_.

“You’d almost think the Obama White House and its intelligence apparatus was weaving a political narrative out of . . . nothing.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54bcc548e0&e=3ee4985eea)

**Fake news:** [“NBC News admits it aired deceptively edited clip of Barr on ‘Meet The Press’ with Chuck Todd”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1779057f48&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Barack Obama is a lawyer, so it was stunning to read that he ventured into the Michael Flynn case in a way that misstated the supposed crime and ignored the history of his own Administration in targeting Mr. Flynn. Since the former President chose to offer his legal views when he didn’t need to, we wonder what he’s really worried about,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f096f47ec6&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “The U.S. Department of State will begin requiring a ‘clean path’ for all 5G network traffic between U.S. diplomatic facilities and the United States, as U.S. diplomatic facilities overseas move toward adopting 5G-enabled technology.” The goal of this new policy is to ensure untrusted IT vendors, including those from China, are denied access to State Department systems. Read more from [Share.America.gov](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34d0b660d1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In many ways, the right to religious liberty stands as the first American freedom, the first freedom listed in the Bill of Rights.” For churches that abide by social distancing guidelines, “civil authorities should allow these gatherings to proceed and let Christians render unto God the things that are God’s,” Mary Vought writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2bd3af3ad&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bdc1bb9f69&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8dbccd3770&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=03460d036b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

And -- with the NRCC and Big Money flooding this race with money -- the outcome will likely be close. Your donation could make the difference. Contributions made through this email will be split between Linda Sanchez for Congress and Christy Smith for Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for taking action, \--Linda S anchez = = Paid for by Stand with Sánchez Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Should we reopen the economy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
33 million are now unemployed | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9de8ea604650/calling-all-patriots-12438158?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ba720b925d&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [VOTE>> Should we reopen the economy?](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3d061c6e56&e=795c6d9796 "VOTE>> Should we reopen the economy?")
---
| Peter,

Small businesses are what makes the U.S. economy the greatest on earth.

I ran a small business for 24 years and our family has been in the oil and gas industry for over 40 years.

I can tell you from experience—making ends meet at the end of every month is a challenge _with or without a national pandemic_.

This, however, is uncharted territory for all of us.

I understand the need to protect our most vulnerable. We needed to flatten the curve to make sure our medical community was prepared to handle the outbreak of the Coronavirus.

**That being said, President Trump has now issued guidelines to enable individual states to reopen in phases using a deliberate, data-driven approach.**

[**Should we reopen the economy? VOTE HERE and then share, tweet, or forward this email to at least 3 people.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bf3ce8e8ca&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | | | | | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f918dd22eb&e=795c6d9796) | [Share](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1552349aba&e=795c6d9796)
---|---
| | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bf32644f6a&e=795c6d9796) | [Tweet](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=af0d9c44f5&e=795c6d9796)
---|---
| | [](http://us20.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8691c6b48d&e=795c6d9796) | [Forward](http://us20.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8691c6b48d&e=795c6d9796)
---|---
| Almost 15% of the country is out of work.

We've lost over**33 million jobs**.

We can't let the cure be worse than the illness. It's possible to open in a safe, healthy way but still let people get back to work.

[**Tell us what you think! VOTE on whether or not we should reopen the economy and then forward this email to just 3 of your friends.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8b1a6840ed&e=795c6d9796)
Thank you and God bless America,

Janet Barresi
---
| [VOTE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=da6bc3ff2d&e=795c6d9796 "VOTE NOW")
---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

subject: Fwd: some good news

body:
When we asked our grassroots movement for stories about Hoosiers going above and beyond to help their neighbors, we knew you would come through. Friend,

When we asked our grassroots movement for stories about Hoosiers going above and beyond to help their neighbors, we knew you would come through. **And you did — we heard more than 80 stories about Hoosiers making heroic efforts to help their communities during this crisis.** Our team loved hearing your stories and sharing them with our fellow Hoosiers. In fact, the grassroots response was so overwhelming that **we wanted to re-open our community hero submissions.** If you didn’t submit a story the first time or want to share another story, you can use the link below to tell us about one of the heroes in your community. **[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/helping-84931](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2814066a98184990b6f429dd877197fe&_e=FAgeCxDmklU9_PF5mBnPlI1gLpWPoFx_ylrGvv4ag-CU3JAhespWkqn-blPJvhFX0Kj5w0xcN46BDfiHXU5QBnFy0RUvWDaXEal4VZKOx7iHUmuTBg817gGRcqKYBDNzQTvc0ocrpONLoSl_PochmQr1asvr4HuVlSKGndBBsxny1lnNGWiykLbUr-CCwiimiVH2Mc-8tbyeBZe1gOvwjdU7W-KVpkb7OxZp0He-8TF02vZOWU8YYBAjKAG3OgvJS8pXZpubTyZy2g4vSTxqjZ_hU5DqdP1ykoAKjrFH-vxMZjsQtnxk9LjeOGQy4wsn1JtEt6J-Tba41idJQHlk3T6PHDBqWDMFf0ryCO1dMfanrsq7JqU_Cv92h3SLWd6leHffrz5WsJtWNb3K_YyljB7Y3at9fCXYVBPGjIIwAyQ%3D)** #INThisTogether, Joe Elsener Deputy Campaign Manager ** — — — Forwarded content — — — ** **From:** Your Holcomb Crew**
Subject:** Hoosiers Helping Hoosiers**

** | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2814066a98184990b6f429dd877197fe&_e=FAgeCxDmklU9_PF5mBnPlI1gLpWPoFx_ylrGvv4ag-CU3JAhespWkqn-blPJvhFX0Kj5w0xcN46BDfiHXU5QBnFy0RUvWDaXEal4VZKOx7iHUmuTBg817gGRcqKYBDNzQTvc0ocrpONLoSl_PochmQr1asvr4HuVlSKGndBBsxny1lnNGWiykLbUr-CCwiimiVH2Mc-8tbyeBZe1gOvwjdJtLzCtPG2_crmpfdwYAd6v0UnVJGQjjYmubefebAwnidQQ9L0DIaApqL9yK4-F_JDZUNk53SU5oBpaVzxBVH9a8qS3WMKmDg3HksaBda7yrrnx0PDkOiaZL-SxYoniXPj9dt-P6IxgolqACr2cF9kWqb7RRdib5WVoONlIEYtbt3G4WmUzpC45119XJj47yZLmW49Qvf4G93dMN2gp8yY%3D) |
---|---|---

For the last couple of weeks, we’ve been sharing incredible community stories about how we’re all in this together.

We’ve seen an overwhelming outpouring of amazing stories since we started sharing them on our social media accounts and we’ve been moved by the sacrifices that we’re seeing from Hoosiers all across our state.

_So this week, we’re asking you to share the stories of the heroes in your community — the nurses, the doctors, the frontline workers — anyone who’s making a huge difference in our fight against the coronavirus._
[ **Share Your Story** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2814066a98184990b6f429dd877197fe&_e=FAgeCxDmklU9_PF5mBnPlI1gLpWPoFx_ylrGvv4ag-CU3JAhespWkqn-blPJvhFX0Kj5w0xcN46BDfiHXU5QBnFy0RUvWDaXEal4VZKOx7iHUmuTBg817gGRcqKYBDNzQTvc0ocrpONLoSl_PochmQr1asvr4HuVlSKGndBBsxny1lnNGWiykLbUr-CCwiimiVH2Mc-8tbyeBZe1gOvwjQITZiEAhAYoVRWW_xZLvuAw-BmiWG_j3m-a_NIHp7wvdDnchbKvAWNsgmYulKHUXJigb6zQ4rZ2cquoTN52wAird_iKKjLOSiFJAwUUCbg_NSxXh_ydeS6WDWYk4onTurgHKc1_PYOLUHwAik6IiE-KqQGlamhhY9NLTAR8PoY7jdUP8bduuDjVlHNgQ9_cyP7TZtSzJEPgWsagk0IjkSc%3D)
We’re going to highlight the most inspiring stories you share with us on our social media accounts and spread the good news far and wide. If you want to share the story of someone in your community who has inspired you during this time, please fill out the form below:

body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4841/4bd7760e/5b9508e1/77af2499/2194006842/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&source=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&refcode=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4841/4bd7760e/5b9508e1/77af2498/2194006842/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1Yjk1MDhlMSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0ODQxIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5b9508e1/29bb4841?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&source=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&refcode=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating") to unsubscribe.
| | BREAKING NEWS:
**Daily Kos Elections moved THREE Senate races in the Democrats direction.**

**Specifically:** Maine Democrat Sara Gideon's race against Susan Collins and North Carolina Democrat Cal Cunningham's race against Thom Tillis moved to **TOSS-UPS!**

**_The Senate Majority is within our sights -- let's put the pedal to the metal._**

[Can you chip in to our Senate Battleground Fund to help end Mitch McConnell's majority?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4841/4bd7760e/5b9508e1/77af24e7/2194006842/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+chip+in+to+our+Senate+Battlegrou&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&source=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&refcode=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating")

| [Chip in $10 Now](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4841/4bd7760e/5b9508e1/77af24e6/2194006842/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+ask+Now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&source=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&refcode=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating")

Let's do some math real quick.

If Democrats win these three toss-up races, and 314-endorsed candidates John Hickenlooper and Mark Kelly win in Colorado in Arizona respectively, **THEN WE WIN BACK CONTROL OF THE SENATE.**

That's the best news you can hear on a Monday -- _but Republicans are looking at the same information we are, and that means they 're preparing to shower these states with dark money._

**That is why we need your help.**

[Chip in now to help us create a Democratic majority in the Senate->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4841/4bd7760e/5b9508e1/77af24e5/2194006842/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+us+create+a+Democrat&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&source=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating&refcode=314_EM_FR_200511_1MC_none_STD_1_senaterating")

name: Bill Olson
subject: 30 Years of Combat Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg
- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

Career politicians like Soto have no real world experience. I have risked my life for our country. The story of my life - and my family’s lives- is one of sacrifice for our country, for our safety, for our freedom.

That very sacrifice - protecting my country and our freedoms - is the exact reason I will be a worthy and honorable member of Congress.

I have seen my share of intense situations that have tested my mettle.

I joined the U.S. Army in the early 1980s, training to be an airborne paratrooper. My early duty stations took me to exotic locations such as the Republic of South Korea (close to the DMZ) and to Cold War West Germany, when the Berlin Wall was still up and being guarded by East German machine guns.

Along the way, I served in Special Forces, Engineer, Aviation, Infantry, and JSOC (operations) units.

That prepared me for a great challenge filled with great danger - fighting in Desert Storm for the liberation of Kuwait.

I served in the 1st Infantry Division, fighting along the “Highway of Death”. It was our job to fight and kill Saddam Hussein’s Republican Guard.

I had the unhappy duty to police the battlefield to protect the fallen - graves registration. You never appreciate the horrors of war as you do with that somber task.

We road marched our vehicles all the way to Basra, and after the negotiated peace, it was our job to guard the burning oil fields. I witnessed the dark soot during the day, and the night alight in fire from burning oil. You could smell the death and the burnt oil mixed in the air.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

We were all contaminated with residue, covered with burned petroleum.

However, we took hundreds of POW surrenders - all of them Saddam’s Republican Guard elite soldiers.

That was not the end of my service to the country in times of crisis however.

I happened to be stationed in New York City during 9-11.

If I thought that the burning oilfields of Iraq were a nightmare, being part of the on-the-ground response to these terrorist attacks, took it to a whole new level.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

The cleanup and rescue missions in New York were massive, and operations began immediately. I was once again called on to work for our country.

I wound up being stationed in New York until 2006, in a large number of roles: providing on-the-ground support to FEMA, supporting firefighters in their mission, and assisting all the agencies to get supplies to Ground Zero, where there never seemed to be enough of certain things.

So far, I had an intense and eventful military career. I had risked my life for my country many times, working to defend our people and our way of life.

But I was not done quite yet.

Once more I got the call to deploy, this time to serve in Joint Special Operations Command in Afghanistan - supporting our soldiers in some pretty remote places.

Here, I got to provide logistics to some key operations.

I was able to support the “tip of the spear”, managing logistics for SEAL team 6, as well as all government agencies in country- NSA, FBI, CIA teams.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

My expertise had me handling supplies, equipment, vehicles, and even support some missions I cannot mention on here.

This was no easy task. For my work I was awarded the Bronze Star, which is still one of my most honored possessions, and something I will always cherish.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

After my service, I retired honorably from the military - just in time to see my three sons join the military. I had one son in the Navy, two in the Air Force. They served in Iraq, Japan, and Afghanistan- one on the same base (Bagram) that I had served years before! Pics of me and my boys below.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

So when people ask me, “Bill, what do you bring for experience as you run for Congress?”, I can answer that I have been a part of every major national challenge over the last 30 years.... And I was the one making sure our heroes had what they needed to get the job done.

I have risked my life for our country and I would do it again. That is the depth of my patriotism, the depth of my commitment to the “Land of the Free.”

But now, I face a different challenge - and I need YOUR commitment to help me see it through!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens - whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution - are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream like Nancy Pelosi. I don't have billions of dollars of George Soros or Michael Bloomberg hand outs.

I earned my education in the Cold War outposts of freeom in Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. And I hate to say it, I served on the battlefield of New York City after 9-11. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies and support the President 100% against all enemies foreign and domestic. And there are plenty of domestic enemies, believe me.

Let's be clear - there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance.

Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more freedom, and more Trump - and less crazy liberal career politician Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg
today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President! Here is Soto below chumming it up with Nancy Pelosi:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

The Dems and their media allies are putting out lies. We need to get the REAL truth out too - and for that, canyou help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need to raise an additional $6,900 by the end of this month to pay for the needed advertising!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=itO6fBuBj_6OuRU&b=.ZsvKKXEp0iOLTX80jNQRg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Congressman Rodney Davis
subject: Join me and help Mike Garcia on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
Friend --
On May 12th, Republicans around the country and President Trump have a chance to do something that hasn't been done in 20 years -- Republican Mike Garcia, a fighter pilot who flew combat missions from the USS Nimitz in the Persian Gulf after 9/11, is on track to win a special election to Congress in **CALIFORNIA**.
But Nancy Pelosi and liberal Democrats are pulling out all the stops. Pelosi is panicked about the possibility of Mike Garcia winning on Tuesday because she knows he will do what is right and put an end to her dysfunctional liberal agenda that has already destroyed California and is about to destroy Washington.

clean_body: Friend -- On May 12th, Republicans around the country and President Trump have a chance to do something that hasn't been done in 20 years -- Republican Mike Garcia, a fighter pilot who flew combat missions from the USS Nimitz in the Persian Gulf after 9/11, is on track to win a special election to Congress in CALIFORNIA. But Nancy Pelosi and liberal Democrats are pulling out all the stops. Pelosi is panicked about the possibility of Mike Garcia winning on Tuesday because she knows he will do what is right and put an end to her dysfunctional liberal agenda that has already destroyed California and is about to destroy Washington. As a first-generation Mexican American and small business owner, Mike Garcia knows what makes this country so special and knows that President Trump's policies and Republican leadership are exactly what is needed to allow for more Americans to succeed. == == Friend, as a member of Congress, I'm confident that if Mike is elected on Tuesday, he will be an incredible representative for his district. Mike will be a key ally for President Trump in Congress so that Californians and Americans across the country can continue to benefit from the successful, common-sense conservative policies that President Trump's America First Agenda has pushed forward. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. In order for Mike to win on Tuesday, he needs the help of patriots just like you to help him hold the line against Nancy Pelosi and the Left. Democratic candidates and the far-Left special interest groups backing them are posting record-high fundraising numbers across the board. We cannot afford to remain idle any longer.
