subject: Vote for the Most Endorsed Republican Congressional Candidate in CD5!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AMY RYAN COURSER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Make sure Conservative Amy Ryan Courser gets your vote in the May 19th primary for Oregon's Congressional District 5.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon.com/lets-put-a-conservative-oregonian-back-in-congress-6362550?e=36bbc8e2ca)
https://amyfororegon.com?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281

** Hi Peter, my name is Amy Ryan Courser, the former elected Keizer City Councilwomen and independent businesswoman running against Kurt Schrader for Oregon's 5th Congressional District.
------------------------------------------------------------
Our campaign has recently been endorsed by some of the most influential conservative organizations and leaders (https://amyfororegon.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281) in Oregon! While this make me extremely proud, the ability to reclaim our seat in the U.S. House of Representatives relies on HELP FROM YOU! We've got the energy, momentum, and endorsements...but we need your support to win the Republican Primary on May 19th!

** I’m asking that you donate any amount you’re comfortable making so that Oregonians like us can take back our district from the left and save our State before it’s too late.
------------------------------------------------------------
https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281

https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281

https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281

https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281

** NOW IS THE TIME TO KEEP AMERICA GREAT!
------------------------------------------------------------

With me as the Republican candidate, the CD5 Congressional seat is WINNABLE, now more than ever! We MUST beat the well-funded Dems at the ballot box in November. Kurt Schrader already has more than $3,000,000 in the bank, so I need your help to WIN THE PRIMARY ON MAY 19th and then WIN IN NOVEMBER!

And the timing is critical, so I need your reply ASAP. I cannot do this alone, so your donation of any amount (https://secure.anedot.com/amy-ryan-courser-for-congress/donate-to-amy?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281) is greatly appreciated! You can learn more about me and my platform by visiting my Official Website (https://amyfororegon.com?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281) or on my Facebook (https://facebook.com/amyfororegon?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=db1c55ead5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-db1c55ead5-221104281) page.

Respectfully,

** Amy Ryan Courser

subject: We all have to do what we can.

body:
2020 is the year we take back our country. It’s the year we bring reasonableness and civility back to our country. It’s the year new, bold leaders like Margaret change the direction of our country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17454271/194993618/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTUwZDM2Mi1jYjkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsSgkI0tzrXTsSc5pZyDXY-jpH-QMf63W_ZECMhNlP8=&emci=6b859753-a393-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1550d362-cb93-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

2020 is the year we take back our country. It’s the year we bring reasonableness and civility back to our country. It’s the year new, bold leaders like Margaret change the direction of our country.

But creating big, bold change doesn’t happen without real, hard work. Margaret has a history of winning tough seats, and what we know from our past success is that we win together when every single person does what they can to help bring the change we deserve. That’s why I’m asking you to do what you can to help.

In order to win this race, we need to sign up thousands of people to Vote By Mail—and we need your help to do it. We have scheduled lots of virtual phone banks in the coming weeks and we need your help to fill them. You can make calls from home, whether you live in Bradenton, Sun City Center, or Gloucester, MA, we will work with you to make sure you have all the information and training you need, but we really need your help. This is an all hands on deck effort!

[**Click here to sign up and we will schedule shifts that work for you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17454272/194993619/192916899?contactdata=EdV8uy6gjziGxgw9WRbLdI7ak5F0VvPVf5s5suYOS9%2FY9OpBXYNWRN2XVVfs%2BsiagD5zbFWDp1GYPnOccZa4Ictv1aKD0RN9vIQlpGaAsU2GMXxDJXDQyQE1YWOVbGUKWkY7%2FlxohrinFvSIiv7c5g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTUwZDM2Mi1jYjkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsSgkI0tzrXTsSc5pZyDXY-jpH-QMf63W_ZECMhNlP8=&emci=6b859753-a393-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1550d362-cb93-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
We've had another successful week thanks to our terrific team of volunteers. Here is a look at what we've accomplished and what he have coming up! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5ed98329402f/your-weekly-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, amazing Dani for Illinois volunteers!

>From all of us here at #TeamDani, I hope you had a great weekend and are staying healthy. If you are in need of any community resources or support during this crisis, do not hesitate to reach out. As always, thank you all SO MUCH for your incredible work this week and for your support of the campaign. As we do every week, check out some highlights and reminders below:
* You were able to reach out to over 2,200 voters in the 16th on the phone this week!
* Big shoutout to Beth J for taking on almost 300 of those calls all on her own!
* We have sent out another 500 postcards to volunteer writers all throughout the District to engage voters and, of course, #SaveUSPS!

**A few reminders** :
* We have another Facebook Live Town Hall coming up tomorrow night at 5:30! Submit questions [here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=548ffb4d83&e=140a9b81e7)

* Everyone within the sound of my voice (or email, or Facebook, or text...) is an activist waiting to be engaged - that means that we all have activist friends. If anyone you know is starting to get itchy to make a difference, send them our way!
* If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, we just need you to invite your friends and pour yourself your happy hour drink of choice!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is....me! We need more tips! What do you do to prepare for a shift of calls, or postcard writing? What opening do you use that works best on the phone? Is there a platform issue that you highlight most? Let us know! Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director
---

name: Senator Todd Young iPhone
subject: We’re fighting for the REAL NEEDS of the American people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
I need people like you on our team so we can continue aiding fellow Senate Republicans in battleground states across the nation. We cannot afford to be intimidated by the challenge ahead of us. Rather we must forge ahead, using our grassroots coalition to ensure even more conservative wins.
_As a former Marine and proud Hoosier, my mission is to defend our conservative values and our American principles of freedom and justice. But this year, my job includes something even more important:**to defend the Senate Republican Majority.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, it is my job to **hold the line** and protect Senate Republicans in critical battleground states this November. I need your help to increase our momentum and **stop** the radical far-Left's socialist takeover of our great nation. **Are you with us?**_
---
Friend

Hi, Senator Todd Young here. I know you're busy, so I'll make this quick.

I wanted to personally reach out and give you a quick update on our progress this month. **With a little over 2 weeks left until our May Fundraising Deadline, we 're still $16,393 away from our goal. **

I need people like you on our team so we can continue aiding fellow Senate Republicans in battleground states across the nation. **_We cannot afford to be intimidated by the challenge ahead of us. Rather we must forge ahead, using our grassroots coalition to ensure even more conservative wins._**

My fight for Indiana, my work on behalf of Senate Republicans and our promise to Americans nationwide, simply cannot on without you. So please, step up before this month's fundraising deadline to help us hit our goal:
[**5X MATCH DONATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLeyDxAbVGwVp8oVY6uYJvX5PqgY5uaq9AkDVGv7PHJQ1aF3NOwTox5uWe8UhwhtL91xK8rrTu1HwleOUdeYQD3plUCmq_4eC142KJEF3r6ou3yrEYfaVZFPz9R7Akb5G9HJCYIhJaax1E5yRxOA_g88Pqld1IzaX-Q-90vBM1zZiwJXOpC-LA94CJVkjLU7xbJO7WEi4eE3zqImg__Sk-QlgRDEaT5fJeSUPnmyijHKLXRs26QEtkDC7ed0ObKMxQ8dh-mu3nv7LwTIVnzaXIeqMbeT_MXMXpwdcbLWFYiBxHSONNrBP-9soBZQBgdBkuplaaVykzoTP2c0u7RxTr3K-hpzXPARmjwfa2a9ffQ4rvlohdKBVRxzxNY8h4fl6zCxHAPeTnJzxNvk4NirVpYdAkAa5BnelDSxK0FaGcBE8aVFWPVaYRn3UGvDACNq&c=u8fMJBfBkVKJWG0mCw2D-aF_9RIxan927BbW7hP7EJ1ANMy8s0jFWg==&ch=cF6d4KCYntDUuMExrGmDoI7nCP40vZSkleeYQ5Sl9ULPP1NgSjv0Lw==)
---
Don't forget, defending the Senate Republican Majority starts with _**YOU**_ , Friend. This is about so much more than hitting a fundraising goal. **This is about protecting our conservative values and fighting for the pro-growth, America-First policies that this country needs right now.**

My goal here is simple: to make government work for the American people. However, with National Democrats moving further and further to the Left each day, dividing our nation using partisan political games, and promoting their socialist platform, this task has become increasingly difficult.

Counting on supporters such as yourself is the only way we can defeat the far-Left and continue fighting for the **_real needs and interests_** of hard-working Americans. So, Friend. What are you waiting for?
**[Donate before the May Fundraising Deadline to access 5X Match!>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLeyDxAbVGwVp8oVY6uYJvX5PqgY5uaq9AkDVGv7PHJQ1aF3NOwTox5uWe8UhwhtL91xK8rrTu1HwleOUdeYQD3plUCmq_4eC142KJEF3r6ou3yrEYfaVZFPz9R7Akb5G9HJCYIhJaax1E5yRxOA_g88Pqld1IzaX-Q-90vBM1zZiwJXOpC-LA94CJVkjLU7xbJO7WEi4eE3zqImg__Sk-QlgRDEaT5fJeSUPnmyijHKLXRs26QEtkDC7ed0ObKMxQ8dh-mu3nv7LwTIVnzaXIeqMbeT_MXMXpwdcbLWFYiBxHSONNrBP-9soBZQBgdBkuplaaVykzoTP2c0u7RxTr3K-hpzXPARmjwfa2a9ffQ4rvlohdKBVRxzxNY8h4fl6zCxHAPeTnJzxNvk4NirVpYdAkAa5BnelDSxK0FaGcBE8aVFWPVaYRn3UGvDACNq&c=u8fMJBfBkVKJWG0mCw2D-aF_9RIxan927BbW7hP7EJ1ANMy8s0jFWg==&ch=cF6d4KCYntDUuMExrGmDoI7nCP40vZSkleeYQ5Sl9ULPP1NgSjv0Lw==)**

Thanks so much for your continued support and your generous contribution.

We cannot afford to be intimidated by the challenge ahead of us. Rather we must forge ahead, using our grassroots coalition to ensure even more conservative wins. As a former Marine and proud Hoosier, my mission is to defend our conservative values and our American principles of freedom and justice. But this year, my job includes something even more important:to defend the Senate Republican Majority. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, it is my job to hold the line and protect Senate Republicans in critical battleground states this November. I need your help to increase our momentum and stop the radical far-Left's socialist takeover of our great nation. Are you with us? Friend Hi, Senator Todd Young here. I know you're busy, so I'll make this quick. I wanted to personally reach out and give you a quick update on our progress this month. With a little over 2 weeks left until our May Fundraising Deadline, we 're still $16,393 away from our goal. I need people like you on our team so we can continue aiding fellow Senate Republicans in battleground states across the nation. We cannot afford to be intimidated by the challenge ahead of us. Rather we must forge ahead, using our grassroots coalition to ensure even more conservative wins. My fight for Indiana, my work on behalf of Senate Republicans and our promise to Americans nationwide, simply cannot on without you. So please, step up before this month's fundraising deadline to help us hit our goal: == Don't forget, defending the Senate Republican Majority starts with YOU , Friend. My goal here is simple: to make government work for the American people. However, with National Democrats moving further and further to the Left each day, dividing our nation using partisan political games, and promoting their socialist platform, this task has become increasingly difficult. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dean=20Browning?=
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter Four – Sanctuary Cities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| ,

Welcome back for another chapter of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.

**Today we will dive into Lisa Scheller’s support of illegal immigration and sanctuary cities focusing on her vote to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county that would harbor dangerous illegal immigrants!
**
Before we begin, I would like to make one thing clear: This Series is a direct response to Lisa Scheller’s phony, slanderous website, where she paid Washington Establishment consultants thousands of dollars to smear my name.

**I am doing this to DEFEND myself against Lisa Scheller’s attacks. Bottom line: There is only ONE true, Trump conservative in this race – me!**

I am passionate and fiercely devoted to the people of Lehigh Valley.

**I am fearful of what will happen to our district if Lisa Scheller is allowed to quietly push her Liberal Agenda on the national stage, like she has done here in the Lehigh Valley.**

This is why I need your help TODAY.

_A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help me to expose Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller for who she really is!_
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=08c3a8ecb8&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| | Lisa Scheller tries to make herself appear as though she is against illegal immigration and sanctuary cities, but the facts – and her OWN VOTE – say differently.

**Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller as County Commissioner VOTED TO MAKE LEHIGH COUNTY A SANCTUARY COUNTY.**

Resolution No. 2014-36 made Lehigh County non-compliant and a sanctuary county.

**This is confirmed by the fact that Lehigh County is on a list of sanctuary jurisdictions complied by Homeland Security in response to President Trump’s Executive Order 13768.**

Under this Resolution, local law enforcement is prevented from complying with any warrant issued by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) asking that dangerous criminals, **such as MS-13 gang members** , be held for an additional 48 hours until ICE can take custody!

So how could Lisa Scheller be against sanctuary cities when she voted to ensure dangerous **GANG MEMBER’S **would be released back into OUR OWN community?

Do you believe she just magically changed her mind now that she is running for Congress?

**I don’t buy it, as Lisa hasn’t said anything about sanctuary cities during the previous five years since she voted to make Lehigh a Sanctuary County. **
_**_Not – One – Word!_**_
The Lehigh Valley needs a real, staunch conservative, not a Liberal, Lying, so-called “Republican” who votes more like The Squad (Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York, Ilhan Omar of Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan), than any conservative I know.
**Here is my policy:

I am AGAINST illegal immigration.
I am AGAINST sanctuary cities.

I SUPPORT legal immigration from all countries for families and individuals who go through the process and want to be in America to contribute to our society and pursue the American Dream.**
Lisa Scheller, similar to Rep. Susan Wild, is in full support of releasing dangerous illegal aliens and GANG MEMBERS back into the community with absolutely zero consequences.

**This is factual evidence of Lying Lisa Scheller saying one thing and then doing the complete opposite!!!**

If you’re like me and support our President, Donald J. Trump, in ending sanctuary cities and cracking down on dangerous illegal aliens and **GANG MEMBERS** , _then I encourage you to contribute to my campaign today!_
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=21976441ed&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| , I hope you can see the difference between Lisa Scheller and myself.

**While Lisa Scheller says one thing and does the other, pushing her Liberal agenda, I am fighting for conservative values FOR you and our President on the front lines (and we don’t need expensive D.C. Consultants to get the job done)!!!**

Together we can beat Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller on June 2nd, 2020, and then take on Socialist incumbent Representative Susan Wild in November.

**Don’t miss next week’s series of The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.**

**Stay Safe, and as always, For Freedom,**
---
|
---
| **Dean Browning
Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07**

P.S. – **did you know that Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller voted to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county?**

How can she support our President and Country when she actively votes against the best interests of the American people? **Lisa Scheller needs to go!**
**_Will you support my campaign today with a donation of $50, $25, or even just $10?_**
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=b6ea518939&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")

name: Team LaHood
subject: Ending our dependence on China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Darin has been selected to help end America’s dependence on China and to hold their leaders accountable for their role in the coronavirus pandemic. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=81a49bc3fea54b4f82887bb9aac242b7&_e=IAJyfJ107RXe2ORNV93fRxJim-SUhJOMvq_hmaFXsq7PtRPOSaVSHa1NsSkKJvm8uWAceyg5oPziYMiWExGTLMo_X82FslyXX-whwHJzzIvcnft-LA6lxhSgmdxHQW-b9ZoqtzjyYZWdehmuEe9pKyND2zJvylGZnni-u6u9U7K1ugobx501aqwlN-ot6yVHkbnnntasKHZtB0MjiajWejDB1w8v27DZyiJUAN5UdIcoICZhhaa_LVEyx-8w5VKZmK21N3DTC0xinuZFXCvmP2inQ0mFP96gH1ONiwnYw4g31fzJltamrocwTt0V6N2Wae7OqLsusLyb5oE-xyJk2Yon6t-A2oUOAJi_NhcegOptMIRvdzw0dkPtxYpbSkDUSwLA8ZHlHpaXdPVzIPh8q0SX57V8TfDWD4_w6I1HdaHcnQ4fNw291Qa4rYSuCqQB-c5Xa64OLzFDdhkSI-DsqRK1ZCtZLpmWYdSq08f040o%3D) | |
---
Friend,

For weeks, Darin has joined President Trump, along with fellow Republicans in pressuring Democratic leaders in Washington to hold the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) liable for its deadly coverup in the aftermath of the COVID-19 outbreak.

_**That effort is officially underway, and Darin is helping lead it as a member of the Republican-led China Task Force.** _
[ **STAND WITH DARIN AGAINST THE CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=81a49bc3fea54b4f82887bb9aac242b7&_e=IAJyfJ107RXe2ORNV93fRxJim-SUhJOMvq_hmaFXsq7PtRPOSaVSHa1NsSkKJvm8uWAceyg5oPziYMiWExGTLMo_X82FslyXX-whwHJzzIvcnft-LA6lxhSgmdxHQW-b9ZoqtzjyYZWdehmuEe9pKyND2zJvylGZnni-u6u9U7K1ugobx501aqwlN-ot6yVHkbnnntasKHZtB0MjiajWejDB1w8v27DZyiJUAN5UdIcoICZhhaa_LVEyx-8w5VKZmK21N3DTC0xinuZFXCvmP3MlIonDk9k5RKg2FbA4_RyGHqCnPsXY8ZlSme0pey0dWYH8bTDCIeMubAW7KkfFYrlG4q-5udqd3tl8OmN11h4MIzPMMt7soJfWJ1FS8FHwjWAe90pdeZ-yK0-qEc2crmgO-3SX-0ejTptuTtn24VLRgGLRBw79MRYBljdGFp577qJcE5jzArvAJ_bqOzEH6EFAJG-iejDsF0LhiwIkfdA%3D)
President Trump, Darin, and his colleagues are focused on holding China accountable for silencing whistleblowers and hiding the truth about the virus, robbing the world of the chance to prepare for COVID-19.

But the Task Force is focused on much more than just China’s deceitful and unacceptable response to coronavirus.

_**It’s about ending America’s dependence on China and making sure that America is in a position to come back stronger than ever when this is all over.**_
[ **STAND WITH DARIN. END AMERICA’S DEPENDENCE ON CHINA** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=81a49bc3fea54b4f82887bb9aac242b7&_e=IAJyfJ107RXe2ORNV93fRxJim-SUhJOMvq_hmaFXsq7PtRPOSaVSHa1NsSkKJvm8uWAceyg5oPziYMiWExGTLMo_X82FslyXX-whwHJzzIvcnft-LA6lxhSgmdxHQW-b9ZoqtzjyYZWdehmuEe9pKyND2zJvylGZnni-u6u9U7K1ugobx501aqwlN-ot6yVHkbnnntasKHZtB0MjiajWejDB1w8v27DZyiJUAN5UdIcoICZhhaa_LVEyx-8w5VKZmK21N3DTC0xinuZFXCvmP9GtoHmLHU0XKaUehGFU-htJwdGcdLSo-77voX-a9hO8HUuD9EdwnLC8mBXYPkULbat1AYlWNH2Eyn0CGKbf87cpDM13d8RAAyqJTp6ZtwFy1Frfe3FkV9RoQF78cHmj2V1dVu4Ctrem1WTp_iyOQ3tgF3iLfEnQj50z5vOySR-mD28lXiJfmz44b6_Df88Kgores7fs4rGvwKBIc4dZKW8%3D)
As a member of the China Task Force, Darin will be responsible for promoting policies on trade and the economy with one goal in mind – **keeping America a strong and independent nation. **
_**“I look forward to working with my Republican colleagues to promote policy solutions that advance the United States’ trade interests, strengthen national security, and ensure that China is held accountable for their failings to combat COVID—19.” **_
**\- Darin LaHood**
[ **STAND WITH DARIN. END AMERICA’S DEPENDENCE ON CHINA** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=81a49bc3fea54b4f82887bb9aac242b7&_e=IAJyfJ107RXe2ORNV93fRxJim-SUhJOMvq_hmaFXsq7PtRPOSaVSHa1NsSkKJvm8uWAceyg5oPziYMiWExGTLMo_X82FslyXX-whwHJzzIvcnft-LA6lxhSgmdxHQW-b9ZoqtzjyYZWdehmuEe9pKyND2zJvylGZnni-u6u9U7K1ugobx501aqwlN-ot6yVHkbnnntasKHZtB0MjiajWejDB1w8v27DZyiJUAN5UdIcoICZhhaa_LVEyx-8w5VKZmK21N3DTC0xinuZFXCvmP9ZaInvV3wtk36wPwUXkjIaQUQvbR3MFHkmgxtUHz_tebMufCvOSfiC77aU72zcEslMbVFIP1y4LYQRx3hfFH7_AoPrRpDmpEmVqhpNL3mA2b80geSZyE0zubKhKuqWUUMyGh-ARtzJRC0NE3RfZfHJDdKOct5wvGJvTT45q1eUHpw-wj3lYFmPERHb-jWfc0tlq4W_PX60FxidTauWAslQ%3D)
As Darin and his colleagues uncover more about the CCP’s efforts to hide the truth about the virus, we will be sure to keep you informed every step of the way.

Thank you for standing with Darin.
Team LaHood

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Help me support James Mackler's campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa177/18d6a294/4ca5f04a/26d60ef1/2217887140/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Friends - I'm proud that Giffords PAC has endorsed James Mackler. He is a proven champion on gun safety and we must help elect him in 2020. There is so much at stake this year: we need to hold and increase the gun safety majority we elected to the House; we need to flip the Senate; and we have to defeat the NRA's #1 ally -- Donald Trump. That's why we are proud to support James Mackler, a tireless ally in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. We are going to need people like James in office if we want to see our gun laws change. **Which is why we need to help elect as many gun safety champions as we can this year, so today I hope you will join me in supporting James ' campaign.** [_**Will you make a $5 donation to James Mackler 's Senate campaign today? We need leaders like this fighting for us in Congress if we want to end the epidemic of gun violence in this country.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa177/18d6a294/4ca5f04a/26d60efe/2217887140/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MTEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200511?refcode=jme200511_m&recurring=true") | | | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa177/18d6a294/4ca5f04a/26d60efe/2217887140/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MTEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200511?refcode=jme200511_m&recurring=true")
---
Every year that passes we see more and more candidates stepping up to run for office with gun safety as one of their leading issues.
2020 is no different. We are seeing candidates running from the state and local all the way up to the presidential level that are making gun safety a priority.
I'm excited to work hard with all of you this year to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot who will be allies in our fight to end gun violence.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
| | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa177/18d6a294/4ca5f04a/26d60efe/2217887140/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MTEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200511?refcode=jme200511_m&recurring=true")

| | Peter --

You've heard from Hillary Clinton, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, and Elizabeth Warren.

We've been endorsed by Barack Obama, Cory Booker, Kirsten Gillibrand, and Amy Klobuchar.

All of these leading Democrats have shown their support for Christy -- **now, it's your turn**.

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd2/29776869/99eec8e/569f1023/277304764/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal17-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd2/29776869/99eec8e/569f1026/277304764/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal17-full")
Mike Garcia is not without the support of Republican party leaders: Donald Trump has been tweeting lies about this race all weekend long.

We've said it before, but we'll say it again: **This race is a referendum on how the country views Trump's response to the coronavirus pandemic.**

On one side, there is a candidate who will continue to be a rubber stamp to everything Trump says and asks for.

On the other side, there is a proven leader who will work tirelessly to solve our country's greatest problems.

**[The choice is clear, and the time is NOW. We need you to contribute $5 or more today to make sure Christy is our district's champion in Congress.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbd2/29776869/99eec8e/569f1026/277304764/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal17-full")**

\-- Team Christy

Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Allen Chen
subject: Have you signed? (put expert advice first for Texans)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hi Team,

Last week Sri sent you this petition calling for our state officials to put the advice of medical professionals first when working to re-open our state and jump-start our Texas economy.

If you agree, we urgently need your signature on this, team. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/-ZuNfdFJgUCHQ-ZJxfeSyg2

Gyms are set to reopen across the state in just a few days -- against the expert advice of pandemic response leaders, like Dr. Anthony Fauci.

We all want to get Texas moving again and ease the current financial strains so many of our families are facing. But if we ignore the advice of our medical experts, our plans to reopen Texas will backfire -- putting our community in serious danger.

Join Sri and our team by signing our petition to call on state leaders to put science first so we can safely restart Texas.

-Allen

-- Begin Forwarded Message --

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Team-

First of all -- I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As always, our campaign team remains dedicated to serving our TX-22 community, so please feel free to reach out to us if there is any way we can be of service to you at this time. [info@sri2020.com]

The last few weeks have undoubtedly been hard for all of us as we try to navigate this “new normal” and do our best to stop the spread of COVID. Families all across Texas are experiencing new hardships -- financial, medical, and personal. Just like you, my campaign team and I are anxious to return to some semblance of life before social distancing.

But as eager as we are, we refuse to be led down a path that ignores expert medical guidance.

As we begin to reopen Texas and put in the hard work necessary to jump start our economy, we need to make sure we’re doing all we can to take smart steps forward, so we do not fall two steps back.

But with salons and barbershops reopening, and gyms following, it’s clear that our state leaders are not doing their due-diligence to keep Texans safe and on the road to recovery.

We can do better, and we must demand better.

Join my campaign by signing your name to our petition to tell our state officials to put science first so we can keep Texans healthy and not risk further harming our economy. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-ZuNfdFJgUCHQ-ZJxfeSyg2]

Thank you for all you do,
Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_pet_2020.05.11_AC_b1_all&amount=15]

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3f133e07-cc93-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/b2b49eca-d493-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmI0OWVjYS1kNDkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tB9pxFgSyhsS_07SUgHiCrp_zWjCs8svAh3FcPJd8vo=&id=117373579&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

subject: MOMENTUM GROWING!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
The endorsements are rolling in for Lisa, and the momentum is growing and fast! I am sure you saw, but last week Lisa was endorsed by SEVEN of Pennsyl Peter, The endorsements are rolling in for Lisa, and the momentum is growing and fast! I am sure you saw, but last week Lisa was endorsed by SEVEN of Pennsylvania’s Republican Congressional delegation! Also, don’t forget that Lisa was also endorsed by Leader Kevin McCarthy and Rep. Elise Stefanik.
Well the momentum never stopped, and this week we have had even more endorsements - this time from your local leaders: ✅ David Argall – State Senate District 29
✅ Jerry Knowles – State Representative District 124
✅ Patrick Foose – Parkland School Board
✅ Shawn Welch - Saucon Valley School Board
✅ Percy Dougherty – Lehigh County Commissioner
✅ Mike Schware – Former Lehigh County Commissioner
✅ Vic Mazziotti – Former Lehigh County Commissioner
✅ Brad Osborne – Former Lehigh County Commissioner
✅ George Halcovage – Schuylkill County Commissioner
✅ Gio Landi – Lehigh County GOP Chairman
✅ Dennis Nemes – State Committee
✅ Blake Marles – State Committee, Chair of NECRA Caucus
✅ Peg Ferraro – Northampton County Council
✅ Joe Hoffman – City Council Candidate
✅ Scott Wagner – Business leader and Republican Gubernatorial Candidate
✅ Jeff Bartos – Republican Lt. Governor Candidate
✅ Stacy Garrity – 2020 Republican Treasurer Candidate
✅ Heather Heidelbaugh – 2020 Republican Attorney General Candidate
✅ Ron Beitler – President of the Lower Macungie Board of Commissioners
✅ Makala Ashmar – Chair of the Pennsylvania Young Republicans
✅ Bill Bachenberg – NRA National Board Member
✅ Tom Carroll - Lehigh Valley Tea Party President

Peter, I am here to tell you that Lisa is the clear conservative choice to take down Liberal Susan Wild and her band of West Coast Congressional Liberals come November. Lisa has stood tall with President Trump and will be the conservative leader Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District needs.
But Peter, if this impressive list wasn’t enough. I wanted to make sure you knew what groups were standing behind Lisa. NRA-PVA AQ (Highest rating a candidate can receive) Firearm Owners Against Crime (Recommended Candidate) Peter, I hope we can gain your support in the weeks to come. We won’t be able to win this race without you - we need you talking to neighbors and telling your friends and family that this district is ours for the taking! name: Team Michelle
subject: Something Extraordinary is Happening in Kansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Dear friends,

We are making history in Kansas, and it is time for the rest of the nation to take note.

Democratic women are making waves in Kansas. In 2018 we elected a female Democratic Governor, the first in over a decade, and we sent Sharice Davids to Washington D.C!

We are building on that 2018 momentum - 2020 will be a year of firsts for Kansans. **Five Democratic Kansas women elected to federal office. We now have at least one woman running in every House district, and two women running for U.S. Senate.**
[DONATE TO KANSAS DEMOCRATIC WOMEN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17455524/195026612/-1970535837?gpsid=8_122_12855&refcode=em20_200511_kswome_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200511_kswome_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmIwNzJjNi1kOTkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAu7TKCPk97orD_mslieO4QbOgF-IYEdulLjUKm-hKM=)
Kansas has a long history of empowered women in leadership. The first female mayor in the U.S. was Susanna Madora Salter in Argonia, Kansas, in 1887. _Her name was put on the ballot as a joke by some men in her town. But the joke was on the men because she won the election. Women have been surprising men in Kansas ever since._

This year we look forward to seeing Sharice Davids hold her seat in Congress. **Meanwhile the three of us (Kali Barnett (KS-1), Michelle De la Isla (KS-2), and Laura Lombard (KS-4)) are running to flip the three other Congressional districts from red to blue.**

Something extraordinary is happening in Kansas, and the nation needs to know. With the grit and leadership of the women like Mayor Salter, Governors Finney, Sebelius, and Kelly before us, Democratic Kansas women are making blue waves in a sea of Red. **Can you imagine the message it will send to the nation if red Kansas turned completely blue?**

If we all work together, we can make this dream a reality. But we need your help. **[Please give today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17455525/195026613/-1970535837?gpsid=8_122_12855&refcode=em20_200511_kswome_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200511_kswome_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmIwNzJjNi1kOTkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAu7TKCPk97orD_mslieO4QbOgF-IYEdulLjUKm-hKM=)**

Thank you, and let’s flip Kansas blue together!

Laura Lombard (KS-04)

name: Team Cotton
subject: China Virus Attack Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Tom has been leading the charge to hold the murderous Chinese regime accountable for unleashing this pandemic on the world. Check out this article from the Wall Street Journal on Tom’s plan to fight back against the Chinese Communist Party.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42472564&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTA1OTAyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
Tom has been leading the charge to hold the murderous Chinese regime accountable for unleashing this pandemic on the world.

Check out this article from the Wall Street Journal on Tom’s plan to fight back against the Chinese Communist Party.

-Team Cotton
A writer on the Asia Times news site last week was perfectly clear about who he considers most responsible for the rapid rise of tensions between the U.S. and China: “Tom Cotton leads the China attack” blared the headline over his piece.That would be Sen. Tom Cotton, Republican of Arkansas, who indeed has become the loudest voice in attacking China’s behavior amid the coronavirus pandemic. In an interview, Mr. Cotton doesn’t mince words about what he thinks this crisis has revealed about China—or how the U.S. should respond.

“More Americans than ever, like more Asians than ever, recognize that China is a pariah state, and we ought to treat them like a pariah state,” he says.

But Mr. Cotton isn’t just one more voice in a growing chorus of China bashers. He actually has a plan to do something. It’s broad and expensive, and is explicitly designed to take advantage of the crisis to roll back Chinese power.

More than that, Mr. Cotton has the ear of President Trump and the State Department, so it’s important to look at what he’s proposing as a sign of where the policy debate is heading.

At the same time, the Cotton plan also begs the question of whether demonizing China will become a self-fulfilling prophecy. Does treating China as a mortal enemy reflect a new reality, or does it create that reality at a time when a more benign course is still possible?

Mr. Cotton’s proposals are rooted in how he explains China’s behavior during the crisis. He strongly suspects the virus was born not in nature but in a Chinese lab in the city of Wuhan, and released by accident there. He acknowledges the evidence for that is only “circumstantial.”

More than that, though, he argues that once the virus was on the loose, China made a conscious choice not to close off its country to prevent the virus’s spread, but rather to let it spread “to ensure the Chinese economy wasn’t the only one to suffer.”

With the crisis now unleashed, Mr. Cotton argues, China’s goal is to take advantage of it to push the U.S. out of the Western Pacific, intimidate its neighbors and force reunification with Taiwan. In other words, he argues, having created a global crisis, China now is attempting to capitalize on that crisis.

His proposed response is encapsulated first and foremost in a new, $43 billion piece of legislation he has proposed, called the FORCE Act. That’s the Forging Operational Resistance to Chinese Expansion Act, and the title captures its goal and scope.

Mr. Cotton would spend billions to build up joint military capabilities with allies in the region. He wants to build a new submarine and more jet fighters to project American power into the Pacific, and build up missile defenses in the region.

His legislation also proposes spending billions to counteract disruptions to the defense industrial base caused by the virus, and to develop new sources of components so the U.S. isn’t dependent on single manufacturers. And it would spend $12 billion to improve America’s electrical grid and satellite operations and protect them from attack—presumably Chinese attack.

Those aren’t the only moves Mr. Cotton advocates. He proposes other steps to address what he calls “longstanding problems” unrelated to the crisis: “I believe there will be more political support now.”

He wants to put more midrange missiles in Asia, based on American territory in Guam and perhaps in allied countries as well, to counter Chinese midrange missiles. He would accelerate arms sales to Taiwan, which China considers a breakaway province.

He wants to make it easier for pharmaceutical and medical-supply companies to move manufacturing out of China and back to the U.S., in part by allowing them to immediately write off capital expenditures made in doing so. Beyond that, and more broadly, he cites a new government fund Japan has established to help Japanese companies move manufacturing supply chains out of China and back to Japan, and says the U.S. ought to consider a similar step.

These all would be risky moves. Demonizing China may simply bolster the position of hard-liners within Beijing, who will see in them justification for their own preference for confrontation rather than cooperation with the U.S. Decoupling economically can cause as much disruption for America as for China. Beijing’s leaders have made clear that arming Taiwan is a bright red line for them.

Ultimately, of course, cold confrontation can lead to hot war. Mr. Cotton counters: “History shows time and time again the way to avoid such things is to draw clear lines about the kind of behavior we won’t tolerate.”

Not many in Washington want to go as far as Mr. Cotton in drawing such lines. But he is a clear barometer showing how the weather is changing.
DONATE NOW http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NzI1NjQS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MTA1OTAyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0NzI1NjQS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MTA1OTAyOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

| |

This week’s list of actions is long, but very doable and fast (and there’s one that’s repeated more than once...) so don’t let the length stop you from getting it done!
**Share our COVID-19 quiz**
**[Share our coronavirus quiz far and wide!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTMyLWQyNTE3MTEyODUxZTRmZWNhMzQyOWI3MWE1YWIxNjQ2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY29yb25hdmlydXMtcXVpei8_bWlkPTQxOTkwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=JMgdlhkaP234rpiTLM38MQ)** Our hope is that this quiz will help ease people’s fears and reopen our communities!

name: Mark Warner for VA
subject: The future of the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
President Trump is pressing forward with his dangerous plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- even though we're facing a global pandemic.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b5/53d9897e/54ef3c0d/1c88714a/2855660197/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-protectaca?refcode=20200511_f_1_nd__573__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek --

Last week, the Trump administration doubled down on their plans to call on the Supreme Court to strike down the Affordable Care Act. If they succeed, millions of Americans will lose access to health care during a pandemic.

Even some of Trump's closest advisors have said that a full repeal should not move forward during the coronavirus outbreak. Bottom line: There's no excuse for yanking health care away from millions of Americans during a public health crisis. This is more than misguided -- it's dangerous.

**The need for broad access to quality, affordable health care has never been clearer.** We're facing unprecedented challenges to our health care system right now, and the administration should be strengthening our health care system instead of attempting to take away health care access and undermining protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

No matter what Trump says about keeping popular parts of the Affordable Care Act intact (like coverage for those with pre-existing conditions), two facts remain:
* The Trump administration is trying to repeal **_all_** ACA provisions, including protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions
* And, more importantly, **they've failed to put a replacement plan forward.**

More than ever, we need leaders like Mark Warner in Washington: people who are committed to fighting for our health care every day and are willing to hold the Trump administration accountable. It's critical that we keep Mark in the Senate.

**[If you have the means, will you consider supporting Mark's re-election campaign? Every dollar gets us closer to sending him back to the Senate to fight for us.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b5/53d9897e/54ef3c0d/1c887149/2855660197/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-protectaca?refcode=20200511_f_1_nd__573__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b5/53d9897e/54ef3c0d/1c887148/2855660197/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-protectaca?refcode=20200511_f_1_nd__573__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Team Booker
subject: Here's the best way you can support Cory's campaign through November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
It's as simple as one click. |
#
Team -- As you know, campaigns are an exercise in managing resources. In normal times, we'd be making a plan for opening offices and hiring organizers at this point in the cycle. But given the COVID-19 crisis, the next few weeks and months are going to be absolutely critical as we figure out new ways to grow our movement and keep folks digitally engaged with the campaign. That's why today we're asking you to sign up to be a monthly recurring donor to Cory's campaign. A sustaining contribution of any amount -- whether it's $5 or $50 -- will help us plan ahead and know what resources we have to work with before we need them. That's a huge advantage and one we need to meet this moment. **Just choose an amount below to get started. If the amount you 'd like to contribute isn't listed, you can choose "Another Amount."** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express,
your monthly recurring donation will be processed immediately._ | | | [Chip in $10 monthly](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200511-fr?refcode=cab-em-200511-fr&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10&recurring=true")

The stakes for this election continue to grow.
Donald Trump and his administration have used their response to this health crisis to divide and score political points for his re-election. Mitch McConnell has tried to use federal aid packages to line the pockets of special interests and corporations instead of the most vulnerable communities. How we respond today and in November will have a massive impact on how fast our country will be able to recover from this crisis.
Cory has been a leader during these challenging times, advocating for policies and legislation in the Senate that would provide access to quality health care, protect workers, expand testing, and lend a helping hand to our small businesses.
**Signing up to become a monthly recurring donor is the best way to make sure that we can keep Cory and his moral leadership in the Senate. Thanks for signing up today if you 're able.**

name: John Hutchison for Supreme Court
subject: Making The Right Decision
body:
The upcoming elections are so important as they will determine who will be responsible for the restart of our economy. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17455968/195043208/-1172787226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwYjE4OS1lMTkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4N4NUn7uT7oA3rM8nZzOS9UHgxisLYPMMzqAqcAeVI8=&emci=2e1563d7-d693-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9c00b189-e193-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4846285) |
---|---
| Dear Friend: Elections are the bedrock of our democracy, but like almost everything else in our lives, they have been dramatically disrupted by the COVID-19 crisis. Moving our election to June 9th is an unprecedented, but necessary decision. It is the right decision to protect our people and limit the risk of exposure for voters, election day workers, courthouse staff and others. The safety of our citizens must come first. Traditional campaigning may seem wildly out of place while people are suffering through unprecedented self-isolation and enduring hardships caused by an economy that has been radically curtailed. However, it is precisely because of these issues that the upcoming elections are so important. They will determine who will be in positions of responsibility and authority as we strive to restart our economy. You know it is important to have steadfast leadership on our WV Supreme Court of Appeals. John Hutchison provides exactly the leadership we need at this fragile time. Please make a donation today. Let’s get John across the finish line. Let’s Keep Justice John Hutchison on the WV Supreme Court of Appeals. [__**Make a donation tonight and Keep Our Supreme Court on the right path.**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17455969/195043209/-1882588567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwYjE4OS1lMTkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4N4NUn7uT7oA3rM8nZzOS9UHgxisLYPMMzqAqcAeVI8=&emci=2e1563d7-d693-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9c00b189-e193-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4846285) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17455970/195043210/-1882588567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwYjE4OS1lMTkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4N4NUn7uT7oA3rM8nZzOS9UHgxisLYPMMzqAqcAeVI8=&emci=2e1563d7-d693-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9c00b189-e193-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4846285)

clean_body: The upcoming elections are so important as they will determine who will be responsible for the restart of our economy. | | | | ---|--- | Dear Friend: Elections are the bedrock of our democracy, but like almost everything else in our lives, they have been dramatically disrupted by the COVID-19 crisis. Moving our election to June 9th is an unprecedented, but necessary decision. It is the right decision to protect our people and limit the risk of exposure for voters, election day workers, courthouse staff and others. The safety of our citizens must come first. Traditional campaigning may seem wildly out of place while people are suffering through unprecedented self-isolation and enduring hardships caused by an economy that has been radically curtailed. However, it is precisely because of these issues that the upcoming elections are so important. They will determine who will be in positions of responsibility and authority as we strive to restart our economy. You know it is important to have steadfast leadership on our WV Supreme Court of Appeals. John Hutchison provides exactly the leadership we need at this fragile time. Please make a donation today. Let’s get John across the finish line. Let’s Keep Justice John Hutchison on the WV Supreme Court of Appeals. | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Committee to Keep Justice Hutchison PO Box 5176 Beckley, WV 25801 United States | ---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH LIVE: President Trump briefs the Nation on testing
body:
The United States will soon hit another milestone in its unprecedented Coronavirus response. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e5f54e101&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 11, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH LIVE: President Trump briefs the Nation on testing**

**The United States** will soon hit another milestone in its unprecedented Coronavirus response: 10 million tests performed across the country. That’s far more than most other nations on Earth _combined_.

🎬 [WATCH LIVE at 4 p.m. ET: President Trump briefs the Nation on testing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8bd9f9e3c&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** has led a historic effort to ramp up testing nationwide, partnering with the private sector to accomplish more than government ever could alone. Starting from scratch, America has now conducted over 8 million tests in just a few months.

**In addition** to testing more people than any other country in the world, the United States is focusing resources where they’re needed most. In hotspot areas, testing is now up to four times more per capita than in other major countries, including South Korea.

**This massive mobilization** , the biggest since World War II, includes expanded production of personal protective equipment, ventilators, tests, and more. Last week, [President Trump visited](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f7d565755a&e=3ee4985eea) a repurposed Honeywell facility in Arizona that now makes N95 respirators—an incredible factory transformation that took just 5 weeks to complete. Efforts like these are paving the way for a safe reopening of our country.

**Thanks to President Trump,** we now have sufficient testing to allow states to begin a phased reopening when they so choose. If state officials and others implement plans correctly, “we will have and there will be enough tests to allow us to take this country safely through phase one” of [President Trump’s Guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=03fb0e02bf&e=3ee4985eea), Dr. Anthony Fauci says.

**“We’re going to build** our country back,” President Trump told a group of Republican lawmakers at the White House on Friday. “And we’re going to build it back fast.”

[WATCH: President Trump discusses how to reopen America’s economy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47ef86eee3&e=3ee4985eea)

**David Limbaugh:**[The President’s critics can’t have it both ways](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=185af0bf88&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

subject: You don't want to miss these segments...
body:
We had a big week on Spicer&Co this week, check out these segments.

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Feepurl.com%2Fg29vHb&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Feepurl.com%2Fg29vHb&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=23b2fc07a0&e=f6564bbe3b Forward (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=23b2fc07a0&e=f6564bbe3b)

** You don't want to miss these great segments from Spicer&Co last week
------------------------------------------------------------
Make sure you check out these great segments from last week on Spicer&Co.

We covered the dismissal of the case against General Flynn and what his case tells us about corruption within the DOJ with KT McFarland (https://youtu.be/lFo9pL827v4?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) , Jenna Ellis (https://youtu.be/dWlpmA7OqfA?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) and more (https://youtu.be/EAhFq0d14Wk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) . We discussed re-opening post coronavirus with Kellyanne Conway (https://youtu.be/mkLQz0z0U_o?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) , Rep. Steve Scalise (https://youtu.be/NcR8wQHm850?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) , and Rich Thau and Jon Last (https://youtu.be/ecQrBxfCx0s?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) . We also discussed China and holding them accountable post-COVID with Senator Tom Cotton (https://youtu.be/UiUsnr_HE4o?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) and you don't want to miss my reaction to what happened in during White House press secretary Kayleigh McEnany's second press conference (https://youtu.be/BYfcbdD7k9s?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) .

Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co".

“Spicer&Co” is back tonight at 6p on Newsmax to discuss another instance of the media's double standard, we'll have Dave Rubin from The Rubin Report, Dick Morris talking about the difference between Trump and Biden on China and more.

I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here (https://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) .

https://youtu.be/33c9Gj-SkGk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193
A weekly wrap of the big stories from this week on "Spicer&Co". Check out our interviews with Kellyanne Conway, KT McFarland, Sen Tom Cotton, Minority Whip Rep. Steve Scalise, Rep. Rodney Davis and more all summarized here.

** Help Support the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer
------------------------------------------------------------
This month I've teamed up with Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193)

In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer (https://seanspicer.com/giving-back/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk has been canceled. So instead you can get a Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to benefit this great cause.

Check out Cameo
here (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) and learn more about PanCan here (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) .

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Leading America

In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=23b2fc07a0-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_11_05_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-23b2fc07a0-68212193) !

Thanks,

Sean

clean_body: We had a big week on Spicer&Co this week, check out these segments. Share () Forward () You don't want to miss these great segments from Spicer&Co last week Make sure you check out these great segments from last week on Spicer&Co. We covered the dismissal of the case against General Flynn and what his case tells us about corruption within the DOJ with KT McFarland () , Jenna Ellis () and more () . We discussed re-opening post coronavirus with Kellyanne Conway () , Rep. Steve Scalise () , and Rich Thau and Jon Last () . We also discussed China and holding them accountable post-COVID with Senator Tom Cotton () and you don't want to miss my reaction to what happened in during White House press secretary Kayleigh McEnany's second press conference () . Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel () to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co". “Spicer&Co” is back tonight at 6p on Newsmax to discuss another instance of the media's double standard, we'll have Dave Rubin from The Rubin Report, Dick Morris talking about the difference between Trump and Biden on China and more. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here () . A weekly wrap of the big stories from this week on "Spicer&Co". Check out our interviews with Kellyanne Conway, KT McFarland, Sen Tom Cotton, Minority Whip Rep. Steve Scalise, Rep. Rodney Davis and more all summarized here. Help Support the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer This month I've teamed up with Cameo () , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. () In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer () , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk has been canceled. So instead you can get a Cameo () shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to benefit this great cause. Check out Cameo here () and learn more about PanCan here () . Leading America In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward. It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now. Pre-order it now here () ! Thanks, Sean ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2020 RigWil LLC, All rights reserved.

| | Friend: this pandemic has created the greatest economic catastrophe our country has seen since 1929.

While history is no predictor of the future, we should look to the past for inspiration to solve our current crisis.

This nation recovered from the Great Depression only through unprecedented strategic spending and mass mobilization of tens of millions of unemployed workers.

[That’s why, along with Senator Kirsten Gillibrand of New York, I’ve proposed creating a national Health Force.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17456328/195051599/-1918517151?source=EM_PET_B1_051120_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhkZGY1NS1lNjkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oltHZGf1G44ETCdVwevbEINhkaBBXAV6sbQ9h5I0BhM=&emci=ee1bef88-e593-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=308ddf55-e693-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

This Health Force will create hundreds of thousands of jobs for people out of work and fill positions that are critical for community health, including contact tracers and case managers.

Once we tackle this pandemic, the Health Force will strengthen our healthcare system in the long-term too—supporting public health agencies that have been tragically underfunded for decades.

Just as community programs during times of crisis have done before, the Health Force has the potential to transform the lives of young people across the country, and also the communities they touch.

[We need ideas as big as the challenge we face, and I believe the Health Force meets that test.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17456329/195051600/-1918517151?source=EM_PET_B1_051120_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhkZGY1NS1lNjkzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oltHZGf1G44ETCdVwevbEINhkaBBXAV6sbQ9h5I0BhM=&emci=ee1bef88-e593-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=308ddf55-e693-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

name: Hegar, MJ
subject: 🚨🚨this isn't ok with me 🚨🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator John Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years in Washington putting special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell ahead of the Texans he's supposed to serve.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef1436a/194102245/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, Running for Senate wasn't the obvious path for me. I'm not a career politician, I have young kids at home, and honestly, most of what happens in Washington makes me really mad. So I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to get into this race (**[if you're already on board, you can make a donation here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14368/194102245/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=10")**). Senator John Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years in Washington putting special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell ahead of the Texans he's supposed to serve. Now he has nearly $13 million in a war chest thanks to help from Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and the private prison industry -- and groups like the Koch network are spending big to support him, too. **I don't expect Senator Cornyn to start putting Texans first anytime soon. That's why I had to get into the race.**[Will you pitch in now to help us win the runoff and head into the general election campaign in the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14368/194102245/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=10") **** Just in the last few years, Sen. Cornyn has voted to rip health care away from millions of Texans, opposed bills to lower prescription drug prices, and stood in the way of any meaningful action on gun safety -- including basic measures that the vast majority of Texans approve of -- even after multiple mass shootings in our own state. That's not ok with me -- and I intend to do things differently. I will fight for you tooth and nail every single day, and my votes will always be based on what's best for Texans, not who's writing the biggest checks. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles working families deal with every single day, you can be sure of that.

****[If you're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can build the campaign we need to win.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14368/194102245/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=10")**** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef1436e/194102245/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef1436c/194102245/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14362/194102245/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14360/194102245/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14366/194102245/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__")**

Thanks for all that you do,
MJ Hegar

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14368/194102245/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200511.2nd__1332__&amount=10")

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef14364/194102245/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1332&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890095/7f51f7bc/4fa1f796/4ef1435a/194102245/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Life Update!
body:
** Life Update!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Hello friends!

It was an honor and a privilege to run for Congress in the 14th District. During the campaign, I loved meeting with Illinoisans, hearing their stories, concerns, and sharing a message of authentic & principled service. It was an honor to meet all of you. Thank you so much and I am extremely grateful for every moment and experience.

After the campaign closed, my heart passionately remained the same - I believe that now is the time to be bold, stand up for what is right, speak the truth, while standing up for freedom and America's future.

Moving forward, I am committed to staying politically involved by being a millennial voice for conservative principles in Illinois. While focusing on my family and businesses for the immediate future, I‘ll also be actively volunteering to help elect local Republican candidates, including Jeanne Ives and Jim Oberweis.

Now is the time to be bold, defend freedom, pursue justice, and stand up for America. I want to encourage you to pursue these principles in this election cycle; Whether through finances, volunteering, or prayer, we must unify together by supporting our candidates to ensure our values and freedoms are protected.

Please check out my new website (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=06d1c982d0&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and my vision (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=87d67b12b0&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country.
To keep up with me on my journey follow one of my social media accounts.

God bless you, and God bless America.

- Jerry, Lisa, & Michael Evans
------------------------------------------------------------
Website (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=349a302a1e&e=b78e7c4d40)
