name: Electoral College Alert
subject: Could Trump win AGAIN?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | BREAKING: "Trump once again has an advantage in the Electoral College." [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a56b/492299095/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://https//go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolish-the-electoral-college?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1") [**Add your name to ABOLISH the Electoral College ->**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a56a/492299095/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://https//go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolish-the-electoral-college?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+ABOLISH+the+Electoral+C&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")
* * *
_This is TERRIBLE, Peter!!_ In 2016, Donald Trump lost the popular vote by nearly 3 MILLION votes -- but still won the Electoral College. And now, top election analysts like Nate Silver think history could repeat itself in 2020!! **It 's never been more clear: it's time to ABOLISH the Electoral College and finally have one person, one vote in our country.** **That 's why we launched an EMERGENCY petition. We need 1O,OOO strong Democrats to add their name to DEMAND we abolish the Electoral College. [Will you add your name?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a56d/492299095/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolish-the-electoral-college?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+add+your+name&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")** | | | [Add your name -> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a56c/492299095/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolish-the-electoral-college?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")
---
It would be absolutely DEVASTATING if Donald Trump won another term thanks to the Electoral College.
**That 's exactly why we MUST come together to make sure we ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all.[ Add your name and be one of the 1O,OOO signatures we need in the next 24 hours!!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a56f/492299095/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://https//go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolish-the-electoral-college?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-++Add+your+name+and+be+one+of+the+1OOOO+s&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")**
| | [Add your name -> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a56e/492299095/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolish-the-electoral-college?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Add+your+name+rarr+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")
---
Thanks,
\-- the Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a551/492299095/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a3/72412298/4f2f85e6/6104a553/492299095/VEsP/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200511_ElectoralColl_U1_X1")

That 's exactly why we MUST come together to make sure we ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all. ""** | | "" Thanks, \-- the Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

name: Claire
subject: Will you help me drain the swamp, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Peter \-
Our last FEC deadline before the primary is just two days away and we're still short of our goal. Right now my opponent's Washington D.C. Super PAC is flooding the airwaves with lies about me. The Swamp will do anything they can to beat me because I've promised to support term limits, shake up Washington, and stop career politicians like Nancy Pelosi.
Unfortunately, this race is close and those lying attack ads work. A race this tight could come down to just a handful of votes. We need all the help we can get to fight back against the D.C. smear machine.
Peter, you and I both know the only way we're going to save the America we love is to drain the swamp once and for all. That's why I'm asking you: [Please donate $10 or more -- every dollar you can spare before midnight -- to help us fight back, get rid of corrupt career politicians, and DRAIN THE SWAMP once and for all! ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K751kWgTKEdXRjWK--n8vwD4ll7tW5lJB1fuC1VH4D3VJ9eCSiURBwg-nrgdCr44DY_HCdKkq50DuFToImzfItADhvVTw9w4jE7lkxg5i0O4YiulYKQELqq_ASV90du98auFvNK_xsI0SvJVC9fIZtapc8yni5yQ_daRQ4aJSU-C9Y64FWunIA==&c=JjDs7eUUh5AykghqxWpBA8u70xfxmeZa-b9DZwV8c2yAp8jUYApLOg==&ch=HlJs0MM-IxWyLa1e0AKk_uBpN0tqCqd6823p2YG9mPSY8eqNo2VpLQ==)

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: We're still behind -- but you can change that
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hey --

I'm going to keep this short because we're behind, and time is of the essence.

Our team is tracking the ballot count as we speak. With just under 32 hours to go, we might lose this pivotal congressional seat to Donald Trump and Mike Garcia.

There's no beating around the bush this late in the race: **We need your support now to get more phone lines, more text messages, and more digital ads urging people to submit their ballots before it is too late.**

**[Chip in $5 now to expand our GOTV operation. Every dollar you give right now will be spent immediately.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f110e/3434054114/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f110f/3434054114/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f1108/3434054114/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f110b/3434054114/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f110e/3434054114/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full")
Campaigning amidst a pandemic is a challenge we never imagined we'd have to prepare for. Yet here we are, defending our House majority, during the peak, and there is no way else to say it: We're _still behind_.

Democrats are known to vote late, so this is by no means over. But with reduced polling locations and social distancing, we're worried the late Democratic surge won't come at all.

**We need to be doing more to get folks' ballots turned in.** This seat is too important to our majority in the House, and we must act fast to save it.

**[Anything you can chip in right now helps. Let's make sure no Democratic ballot goes unreturned.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f110e/3434054114/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full")**

Thank you,

\-- Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign Manager
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbce/29776869/9986ea3/569f110e/3434054114/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxOC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal18-full")

Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Team Tina
subject: Tina is working to provide relief during this crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
It’s important that you know Tina is working hard to provide relief for communities in Minnesota and across the country amid this crisis. Last week, Tina introduced _The Supporting State and Local Leaders Act_ to help state and local governments provide paid leave to police, firefighters, and other workers during this pandemic. Tina has continued her fight to secure emergency relief for the United States Postal Service, making sure folks everywhere can continue to rely on this critical lifeline for their medication, protective equipment, and necessary household goods. She and Elizabeth Warren led 29 of their colleagues in urging Senate leadership to include their plan for a $50 billion childcare bailout in the next coronavirus relief package. Tina, along with Amy Klobuchar, also called on the Trump Administration to help ensure the safety of the nation’s food supply and protect essential workers in the food supply chain. This work is critical as we fight to provide our families and communities with the support they need to get through this crisis, but the truth is, all of these things would get done a whole lot faster if Democrats controlled the Senate. **That’s why we’re asking you to chip in just a few bucks to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat and flip the majority. We cannot afford to lose a leader like Tina or let the Senate majority slip through our fingers. Last week, Tina introduced The Supporting State and Local Leaders Act to help state and local governments provide paid leave to police, firefighters, and other workers during this pandemic. Tina has continued her fight to secure emergency relief for the United States Postal Service, making sure folks everywhere can continue to rely on this critical lifeline for their medication, protective equipment, and necessary household goods. She and Elizabeth Warren led 29 of their colleagues in urging Senate leadership to include their plan for a $50 billion childcare bailout in the next coronavirus relief package. Tina, along with Amy Klobuchar, also called on the Trump Administration to help ensure the safety of the nation’s food supply and protect essential workers in the food supply chain. This work is critical as we fight to provide our families and communities with the support they need to get through this crisis, but the truth is, all of these things would get done a whole lot faster if Democrats controlled the Senate. That’s why we’re asking you to chip in just a few bucks to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat and flip the majority. We cannot afford to lose a leader like Tina or let the Senate majority slip through our fingers. Your contribution today would go a long way in our work. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We must flip the Senate this November to ensure our families and communities have the support they need during this crisis and beyond. With your help, we can get the job done. Thanks for reading. Take care of yourself. — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: wanted to reach out directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I'm running a people-powered campaign - that means checking in with folks like you.
| | |
---
Hi friend,
I'm sure you have a lot on your mind right now, so I wanted to reach out directly.
As a pastor, I've worked to build bridges between people - that's my job. I'm running for U.S. Senate in Georgia to put the kitchen table concerns I hear from everyday folks - on issues like the cost of health care and the dignity of work - at the top of the agenda in Washington.
**But to do that, I need to hear from folks like you, friend. I 've put together a few questions - to just check in and find out what's top of mind for you during these uncertain times. [Will you be one of the 500 people we need to take this short survey and share what issues matter most to you?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-may-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk219-su-nd")**
I put some time on my calendar for tomorrow morning to read over your responses, so I hope you'll take a moment to complete the survey before then.
Thanks - and please take care.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7d3/288179be/ba7f5d6/348e9e7d/1527521426/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

body:
| []()

| | Hi Peter,

We'll keep this short: Last night's ballot returns are out -- **and we're still down.**

We're getting closer, but not at the rate at which we need.

**Even worse, we're being outspent on the air by Mike Garcia.**

There's a reason this race has been rated as a "Toss-Up" by so many pundits: It's simply so difficult to predict what will happen in this almost entirely vote-by-mail election. And our voters don't turn out regularly for special elections like the Republicans do.

**We are doing every single thing we can to defeat Mike Garcia -- but it's clear that we have to step it up for the final hours.**

**[We have a last-minute ad-buy in the works -- but we need you to step up now to get it up in time. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can to help do _everything_ possible to win tomorrow? ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbcd/29776869/99b579f/569f124c/925223852/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNF9ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal14_non")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbcd/29776869/99b579f/569f124d/925223852/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNF9ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal14_non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbcd/29776869/99b579f/569f124e/925223852/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwxNF9ub24ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_milliongoal14_non&express_lane=true&amount=25")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: A little reassurance along the way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
tune in here | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7144fdcad9e8439b86e5a788d4e9da87&_e=Ul-EjXn1DiVSq4utn0IE_sa47ceTRRIr6GEQoAUhrqOYfwD_DIvlRRkGNT0TrHqQ8OyF4-MloB7P1-jJgq5JMtmXSEe3PlEsJQbhKPbyXSVwm1dBMkFS0TBlkD8sSRfetySNfjCfSQnAmXvz5FTEM-bCNwLblNpGEHmsmKJk4T6yMZs8uc2lY4NGCMStpoWWe1QLD5mC4J3DFP49hkRIV1qEl1czv4WfQigarnPiTLCM5blD5RxfD7PIFVL2ySzZM6hhVI_nHxGsnn0wrnrhhv5GXzBsDfl_-e3ySNhBlqjZRwBvYOiC9405zpg2Ix7u1oofgX37kYSBUUPPWa3MB-D5qU-xNPf5ywECLIVqKyWk6SScPPA-c1MIZv4MaG2z) |
---|---|---
Friends,

Reliable information, access to medical care, available PPE, centralized contact tracing...

It’s all about working to keep Hoosiers safe as we continue to take measured, data-driven steps on Indiana’s **[Back on Track Plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7144fdcad9e8439b86e5a788d4e9da87&_e=Ul-EjXn1DiVSq4utn0IE_sa47ceTRRIr6GEQoAUhrqOYfwD_DIvlRRkGNT0TrHqQ8OyF4-MloB7P1-jJgq5JMtmXSEe3PlEsJQbhKPbyXSVwm1dBMkFS0TBlkD8sSRfetySNfjCfSQnAmXvz5FTEM-bCNwLblNpGEHmsmKJk4T4BgVlGZQZV-YamNRB_8DxEOKmwpm6NXbhEmef41GgqAY5vNfNhL2SQj2RoPprgcG5GUwCTNrfceoypLZzjgaI-x1Z2dDG2_9QBrAwvZYms-qWOKHi74M9ySiUEZxwz245iBggYbJb7OaefFShTzaOA_49RDi6reTFRPNltbiS34HyJ8wtpHQWaOw15zmJ9adwO9RjfW0xsR9KcEj5vQ7V1)**.

_**And, as Governor Holcomb said today, it’s about providing us all with reassurance along the way.**_

That’s why Governor Holcomb announced that as we continue the phased-in reopening of businesses (with many more opening today as part of Phase Two), he will _**continue to hold updates every Monday, Wednesday and Friday**_ at 2:30 p.m. ET/1:30 p.m. CT. If you haven’t been watching, you can **[tune in here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7144fdcad9e8439b86e5a788d4e9da87&_e=Ul-EjXn1DiVSq4utn0IE_n6wftyN7NAQkGc3pnnRpUs8qemEX4oqsKRY9S39G7IsU-6ZB-F8Px8LmKmW7I6OdCgv_zfJUsuo0sBQ1Rw-VAzsScBdXSBXtqudqlRaPaFmOIR7sMi_vc6AF9SWncXXHrjfom3_0GXQBG5QrnZ8sZPTOJ-uzOLdQbWWm7LIwX_xKDH8qJ_Y6uCtWjE9mlZ_0GoXhp-ji9GJXzQ1ds-AZyylP7_ksWq1FASo07tT-Q5-LcqMZ9fG5SSgftytILF2MJdjX_QN0nDD-RpTCHC1IcJ6h6CBmajVvHEbCgbGOXqIoFq9Qfqug-CH8mfwBmAeQ_atHzV12bETDuMOvXkjcg3Fi3vruKIb38cMnl2jWR_fPlVlIua8E0MD6I2KIq8St176ecirLFbaAV-HmuDLmNRlQOhMI2KzdLyHl_uGmRxGX7td1ZPEibhFqfLQt_0XyBm-bKATN7zSX9HmzALoOq0fnc5eAsBypgQIysBYhmki5_oN69Yd_tWxmRaZQXbTltJnVnJRh9khfg4dupRv8h0%3D)**.

It’s also why Indiana’s _**centralized contact tracing launched today**_. As Hoosiers start to leave home more, this will help us limit the spread by:

* Better tracing who has been infected.
* Contacting those they’ve come in contact with.
* Consulting and treating those individuals directly and limit further exposure.

[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7144fdcad9e8439b86e5a788d4e9da87&_e=Ul-EjXn1DiVSq4utn0IE_sa47ceTRRIr6GEQoAUhrqOYfwD_DIvlRRkGNT0TrHqQ8OyF4-MloB7P1-jJgq5JMtmXSEe3PlEsJQbhKPbyXSVwm1dBMkFS0TBlkD8sSRfetySNfjCfSQnAmXvz5FTEM-bCNwLblNpGEHmsmKJk4T6AyINvzeq8rg5JEm0_h7IpFJgCI8P0hCetP-0enixteJ9vgF1wKfpIZ4-RmAx_rGVR6bhc-cuvFG-9fRu_dZbo7IR5V4iWjXbeiX5Z7p-OaasqlFHXSqJCjiivCHnHjNAyjSZf1Hs2Oabprdss0q6DL_6bpxNXGggBSoQBCMPefW0DNlmzxOl2V0JeqZWcP58pv_u1l54Uvbh9RfL6tZeT)
Indiana’s got a team of 325 people working right now to help us keep track of the spread among Hoosiers, with that reaching 500 contact tracers by the end of the month. Their job is to help keep this virus from spreading further – and be assured that _**all information gathered by contact tracing is kept private.** _

And one more piece of reassurance – know that our state’s healthcare heroes remain here for you. With the lifting of restrictions on elective procedures, _**now is the time to make sure you still have your preventative screenings scheduled – especially for our youngest Hoosiers. It could save lives.**_

Here in Indiana, we’re getting Back on Track, and know that Governor Holcomb and your state leaders are here – every step of the way.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. If you’re in Indianapolis, look up tomorrow! The U.S. Navy Blue Angels will **[take to the skies at about 2 p.m.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7144fdcad9e8439b86e5a788d4e9da87&_e=Ul-EjXn1DiVSq4utn0IE_n33KlV12CgcmHlb3RceMVIOOJthzGAS1PUi6UHInbTX7YgaX5Ni8r0lbz5emiGHd7uSAY5Yr9yM2REq4HiM_xHfMKXlqdKa10C2GrcaMZEbRZqz1kx2QnAUu35ui-Au1ljSJNOtYmAAzRRCdGCYzMdEMJjirtkWxMyyBbLksyQxJ4rWQmXvl1rMvZIIJJmAwY5b-mZr4627eYfsTcH1ZyIiACIn6xwm_KrplHbE397fFYh3yL3LL25IuV_BtYknUaYbPGggqXle6GwCsmXmKvYnyNlQlsXSKgpdh9qk26n4KPGcCcni9XuVzYpg0tOQKBNPtPoGpOycexLA6NtzwJ5uH5AIG0bLI26siI18QUdQLpQ32vUZXtklyXBNjp6ymnV1N2O7m9SVP8kv_3uDTa4%3D)**!
